chapters.text: Atil abul’a pat’a amua ahetoh ho le athusei phonga pang hon eihil banguva,
ilah uva guilhung thu chan hi sutna hin mi tamtah-in akhut apantauve.
Hijeh chun mi chunnung Theophilus, nangma kama nakihilsa chu akichetna nahetna dingin,
keiman jong amaho sut chengse chu abul’a pat’a abancha achen achaiya kichentah a kasuh toh a nangma dinga hinsut ding kaphasah ahi.
Judea gam lengpa Herod lal laiyin Abijah loi lah a thempu khat amin Zechariah kiti aumin ahi. Ainneipi chu Aaron son ahin amin Elizabeth ahi.
Ani lhona Pathen mitmua chondih tah gel themmona neilou Pakai thupeh jouse le chonna danthu jouse jui kimkeiya ahilhone.
Amabou Elizabeth achin jeh-in cha neilou ahilhone; chule ani lhonin hateh-in ateh gel lhontan ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, aloite kitolna dungjuiya Pathen ang a na atoh pet’in thempu chonna ngaiya,
Pakai houin a alut’a thil namtui hal chu achang khatan ahi.
Chule thil namtui ahal pet chun mipi chu polamah ataovun, hiche pettah chun Pakai Vantil khat ahengah a hung kilah-in,
thil namtui kihalna maicham jetlam a chun ahung dingin ahi.
Zechariah chun ama chu amu phat’in alungkham in chule kijong akichan ahi.
Amavang Vantil chun ama jah a, “Zechariah kicha hih-in, nataona aki ngaitai; chule na-inneipi Elizabeth chun chapa khat ahin ding ahi, chule nangman amin John nasah ding ahi.
Chule nangma dingin thanopna le hapa kipana hintin, ama pen a chu mi tamtah kipah ding ahi.
Ijeh inem itile ama chu Pakai mitmua lentah ding ahi, chule ama chun lengpiga twi le ju adon louhel ding ahin, anu oisunga auma pat’a Lhagao Theng dimset ding ahi.
Chule Israel chate tamtah a-Pakaiyu Pathen henga alehei ding ahi.

Chule kigosadema um ho chu Pakaiya dinga kigotsah dinga, apate lung achate lama heiya, michonpha ho chihna a thua nungloute chonsah dinga, aman Elijah lhagao le thahat aken a ama masanga che ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Zechariah chun Vantil jah a chun, “Ahi keila katehtan, kaji jongla ateh tan, iti kahet ding ham?” tin adongin ahi.
Chuin Vantil chun adonbut’in, “Keima Pathen ang a ding jing Gabriel chu kahi, nangma jah a thusei ding le hiche thupha hi seipeh dinga hinkisol kahi.
Chule ven, aphatcha guilhung ding kasei thu natahsan loujeh a athu guilhun ni kahsea pao louva thu seithei louva naum ding ahi,” ati.
Chule miho chun Zechariah chu angah un Pathen houna in sunga aum sotden chu adatmo lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin ahungdoh phat’in ajah uva thu asei theitapon ahi; hichun amahon intheng sunga mu khat anei ahi, ti ahetauve, amavangin amaho chu akhut’in athon paomon aumtai.
Athemput kin chu achai phat’in ain lama achetan ahi.
Hiche jou chun ainneipi Elizabeth agaitan ahile, amanu lha nga akisel’in ahi.
Chuin aman mi lah ami isah lou kachan hi suhmangna dinga Pakaiyin keima eivet’a hitia hi eibol ahi, ati.
Chuin lha gupna-in Pathena konin Gabriel Vantil chu Galilee gama khopi khat Nazareth atiuva chun nungah thengtah khat henga akisol’in;
nu-ngahnu chu David son amin Joseph kitipa jihol ahin; nu-ngahnu min chu Mariam ahi.
Chuin amanu henga chun alut’in, “Chibai sah chungnungnu, Pakaiyin naumpi,” ati.
Ahin chuche athusei jehchun amanu alunggim lheh jengin alungthim in, “Itobang phatthei bohna ahitadem?” atin ahi.
Chuin Vantil chun amanu jah a, “Kicha hih-in Mariam, ijeh-inem itile Pathen lungdei lam nahi.
Chule ven gaiyin natin chapa khat nahin ding ahi, chule amin Jesu nasah ding ahi.
Ama chu hung len ding ahi, chule chungnungpen Chapa kiti ding ahi; chule Pakai Pathen in ama chu apu David laltouna apeh ding ahi.
Ama Jacob son ho chunga leng changa atonsot atonsot geiya vaipo ding, agamin itih chan hijongle kichaitih ni neilou ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Mariam in Vantil jah a chun, “Hichu iti hi ding ham? Pasal la kaneipon,” ati.

Chuin Vantil chun adonbut’in, ajah a, “Lhagao Theng nachungah hung chun tin chule Chung-nungpen thilbol thei nan nahinlekhu ding ahi, chule hichejeh a chu ahung peng ding athenga chu Pathen Chapa kiti ding ahi.
Chule ven, nanulamnu Elizabeth jongin ateh nungin chapa khat akotai; achinga aseinu u chu agaiyin tun lha gup ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itile Pathena kona thupot chu thilbol thei louva umlou ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Mariam in, “Ven, keima Pakai sohnu kahi, kachungah nasei bang bang chun lhung hen,” ati. Chuphat’in Vantil chu amanu koma kon-in achemang tan ahi.
Hiche jou chun Mariam akipat’in thinglhang gama Judea khopi khat’ah acheloitan ahi.
Chuin Zechariah in a alut’in, Elizabeth chu chibai aboh-in ahi.
Chuin Elizabeth-in achibai boh ajah phat’in a-oisunga naocha chu ahung kichomin, chule Elizabeth amatah Lhagao Theng adimin;
chule o sangtah-in asam-in, “Numei lah a nun noma nalai gil ga jong nun noma nahi.
Chule ka-Pakaipa nu kahenga ahung hi hoilam iti thu hitam?
Ijeh-inem itile ven, nei chibai boh ogin kajah jah-in ka-oisunga naocha athanomin ahung kichomin ahi.
Pakaiyin ajah a thu asei chengse guilhung ding ahi, tia atahsan a chu anun nome,” ati.
Chuin Mariam in: “Kalungin Pakai achoian-e,
Kalhagao jong eihuhhinga Pathen ah akipah behseh jengin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Aman asohnu lhah chom chagat aven ahi; Hijeh chun vetan, tua lhah a Akhang akhanga mi jousen Anun nom eiti dingu ahi.
Ijeh inem itile Hatchungnung in Keima thil loupi tah eibolpeh tai; Amin jong Athenge.
Chule ama gingte chunga Akhang akhangin alungset aumpeh jinge.
Aman abanin athahatje avetsah tai. Aman ama lung gel’a Kiletsah hoithote ho asucheh tai.
Aman ahat apaoho alaltou nauva konin ason lhan. Namchom chagate ho atungdoh tai.
Agilkelte ho thilpha phan avahvan, Mihaote ho khut gohkeovin asol-mang tai.
Ipu ipateu athutep bang chun Abraham le achilhahte.
Tonsot geiya alungset je chu Ahetdoh jing nan asoh Israel ahutan ahi,” ati.
Mariam amanu koma chun lha thum jen aumin, chuin ain lamah akiletan ahi.
Chuin Elizabeth aso phat ahung lhingtan ahile chapa khat ahingin ahi.
Chuin ainheng ho le ainko ho chengsen Pakaiyin aha lungset behseh jeng chu ajah phat’un amanu chu akipa athanop piuvin; aniget nin naosen cheptan ding chun ahungun ahi.
Amaho chun apa bangin Zechariah sah dingin agouvin; ahin anun adonbut’in,
“Ahipoi, naosen min hi John sah ding ahi,” tin ama ho jah a aseiyin ahi.
Chuin amahon, “Naphung lah uva koima min chutobang um louva,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in amahon, “Amin ipi nasah nom em?” tin mit heiyin apa adongun ahi.
Chuin aman lekhasutna pheng athumin, “Amin John ahi,” tin asuntan ahi. Hichun ami jouse chun adat mo lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin chupet tah chun akam le alei akilham in Pathen avahchoiyin apaotan ahi.
Hichun akimvel’a cheng chengse chungah kichat achutan, chule Judea gam thinglhang jouseah hicheng thusoh thu chu akisei thangtan ahi.
Chule aja jousen hichu alungin aching cheh-un, “Hiche chapang hi ipi ahungsoh tadem?” atiuvin ahi. Ijeh-inem itile Pakai khut’in aumpin ahi.
Chule apa Zechariah chu Lhagao Theng adimset’in agaovin thu hicheng aseiyin ahi.
“Israel Pathen Pakai vahchoiyin um hen, Ijeh-inem itile aman amite avil’in alhadohna aboltai.
Chule asoh David insung mite lah a Huhhing hattah ki khat eitundoh peh tauve.
Malaiya pat’a aman athemgao theng ho Kama asei banga chu;
Imelmateuva kon le eihoteu khut’a kona Huhhing nan;
Iputeu ipateu akhotona chu vetsahnale Athutep theng chu geldoh jing nan;
Ipuluiyu Abraham jah a Akihahselna bangtah-in,
Igalteu khut’a kona huhdohna eisempeh uva, Ihinlai sungseuva ama angsunga olmona nei louhel’a.
Thengtah le dih tah a Ama ihou theina dingu ahi.
Chule naosen, nangma Chungnungpen Themgao kiti ding nahi; Ajeh chu alampi sem dinga Pakai masang sanga nache ding ahin;
Amite chu achonsetna suhbeiya Huhhinga umna lungthim napeh ding ahi.
I-Pathenu mikhoto lung nemheo vanga, Thina lim muthima touho salvah dingle
Ikengu lungmonna lama chesah dinga Chungnunga kona nisa soh chun ihung vil dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuin chapang chu ahung seilen in lhagao a hattah ahitan; chule Israelte henga akipondoh ni gei chun gamthip’ah aumin ahi.
Chuin hiti hi ahi, hiche lai chun Caesar Augustus chun leiset chung cheng jouse min sut ding thu apen ahi.
Hichu Syria gama Quirinius gamvaipo ahilaiya min kisut amasa pen ahi.
Hichun mi jouse chu amin sun dingin ama ama khopi cheh a acheuvin ahi.
Chule Joseph jong chu David inko le aphung ahijeh chun Galilee gama Nazareth khoa konin amin sun dingin,
ajihol Mariam gaihamset chutoh Judea gama David khopi Bethlehem atiuva chun achetan ahi.
Chuin amani chukoma aumpet lhonin Mariam aso phat alhingtan ahi.
Hichun achapa masapen ahingin; chuin ponin ajel’in jinlhun in a mun aon loujeh chun gan ankong sunga alupsah tan ahi.
Chule hiche gama chun loujaova tol lhanga geh kelngoi ching ho aumun, janin akelngoi honu angah-un ahi.
Chu-in Pakai Vantil khat akomuvah ahung dingin, chule Pakai loupi chun akimvel’u asalvahsoh jeng tan ahi; hichun amaho akicha ta ngei jengun ahi.
Chuin Vantil chun ajah uva, “Kicha hih-un ijeh-inem itile veuvin, keiman nangho miho jouse dinga chu hachangpa kipana thupha kahinpoh peh nahiuve.
Ajeh chu tunin nangho dingin David khopiah Huhhinga khat apeng tai, ama chu Pakai Christa ahi.
Chule hiche hi nangho dinga amelchihna ding ahi; nanghon naosen pona kijel’a gan ankong sunga lum nagamu dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuin phulou helouvin Vantil chutoh vanmi janel honpi ahung umun Pathen avahchoiyun,
“Chungnungpenah Pathen loupi hen, Chule lei chunga alung lhaina miho lah a cham leng hen,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, Vantil ho chu amaho koma kona vana achemang phat’un, kelngoi ching ho chun, “Cheuvin Bethlehem a cheu hitin, tua Pakaiyin eihetsah-u thusoh hi gaveu hite,” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuin amaho acheloiyun ahile, Mariam le Joseph toh gan ankong sunga lum naosen chu agamudoh tauvin ahi.
Chuin hichu amuphat’un hiche naosen thu umchan dol ajah uva kisei chu ahetsah tauvin ahi.
Chuin ajah uva kelngoi chingho thusei chu ajapha jousen kidang asauvin ahi.
Mariam vang chu thu kisei jouse chu alungin angaiton aching jinge.
Chuin kelngoi chingho chun ajah uva kisei bang banga thil amu chengseu le athil jah chengseu jal chun Pathen choiat le vahchoi thon akile tauve.
Chuin ani get nin cheptan ding nikho alhingtan, amin Jesu asah tauve, hichu naobua aum masanga Vantil chun asahsa ahi.
Chuin Mose thupeh dungjuiya akisuh theng nikho alhin phat’in ama chu Pakai henga peh dingin,
Pakai danthu bua ‘Naobu phukeh a hung pengdoh pasal jouse chu Pakaiya dinga atheng kiti ding ahi,’ ati banga chu;
chule Pakai danthua kisei vakhu kop khat hijongle vapal nou ni hijongle lha dingin Jerusalem a apuiyun ahi.
Chuin veuvin, Jerusalem a chun amin Simeon kiti mi khat aumin; amapa chu chonphatah le Pathen ngaisah tah ahin, Israelte lung monsah dinga chu ngah jinga ahin; ama chu achunga Lhagao Theng uma ahi.
Chule Pakai thaonu Christa chu amu masanga ama athi lou ding chu Lhagao Thengin ahetsah a aphondoh ahi.
Chuin ama chu Lhagao puiyin houin sunga chun ahung lut’in,
chuin achung changa chonna dan ngaiya bol dinga anu le a pan naosen Jesu chu apui phat’un, aman akhut’in alan chule Pathen avahchoiyin;
“Pakai, tun nangma thu dungjuiya Nasoh hi lung monga neilhadoh ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile nami huhhingna Kamit nin amutai;
Miho jouse mitmua Nangman nagot,
Chidang namdangte henga Vah kilangdoh dingle, Nami Israelte loupina ding chu,” ati.
Chuin naosen umchan ding thudol kisei chu anu le apan kidang asa lheh lhonin ahi.
Chuin Simeon chun phatthei achunguva aboh-in, anu Mariam jah a, “Ven, hiche chapang hi Israelte lah a mi tamtah lhuhna le dindohna sodohsah dinga, chule seiset kihetna melchihna a kitung ahi.
Ahi, mi tamtah lunggel kiphondohna dinga nangma lung jong chemjamin asutpai ding ahi,” ati.
Chule Asher phunga mi Phanuel chanu Anna themgaonu aumin amanu chu hateh a teh ahitan, anungah jaineiya pat’a ajitoh kum sagi chengkhom ahin,
chule amanu chu kum som get le kum li geiya meithaiya uma ahi, amanu chu houin a kona potdoh louhel’a an ngol’a Pathen houva asun ajan a taojia um ahi.
Chuin hiche nidantah chun ahungin Pathen athangvah-in Jerusalem lhatdoh ding kat jinga umte ho jouse jah a chun Jesu umchan thu aseiyin ahi.
Chuin Pakai danthu dungjuiya thil abol chaisoh phat’in Galilee gama akhopiu Nazareth khoa akile kit tauvin ahi.
Chuin Chapang chu akhang akhangin ahatdoh tul tul’in chihna ahung dimset tan, Pathen lungsetna achungah aumin ahi.
Chuin anu le apa chu kumseh-in kalchuh kut le Jerusalem a ache lhonin
Chuin ama kum som le kum ni ahin kalchuh kut chonna ngaiyin Jerusalem a achetou vun;
chuin kut achaiyuva akile kit phat’un chapang Jesu anunguvah Jerusalem ah aumden tan, chule hichu anu le a pan ahe lhon hih-in;
‘Mihon lah a chu uma ahi’ tin angaito lhonin, ni khat lam achetauvin; chuin amanin ainkote ho le akihetpi ho lah ahol lhonin;
chuin amudoh lou phat’in Jerusalem lamah akile kit lhonin aholpeh lhontan ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, ni thum jouvin ama chu houin sungah aga mudoh lhonin, mi hilte ho lah a anatouvin thu ana ngaiyin, dong jong anadongin;
chule athu ja chan chun ahetje le athu donbut chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin amu phat lhonin alung dong leo lhonin; chuin a nun ajah a, “Chapa, ibol a neihiti bol lhon ham? Veta, napa le keiman lungdong tah-in kahol lhon ,” ati.
Chu-in aman amani jah a, “Ibol’a neihol lhon ham? Keima ka-Pa insung kin a um ding mong kahi nahet lhon lou ham?” ati.
Ahin ajah uva athusei amahon angaiye ahepouvin ahi.
Chuin amani toh alhonin Nazareth kho’ah achesuh-un, athu thu lhonin anungin, chule anun hicheng thu kisei jouse chu alungin achingtan ahi.
Chuin Jesu chihna le atah akhangtou touvin, chule Pathen le mihem sah-in aumtan ahi.

Chuin Tiberius Caesar leng chan akum som le nga na-in Pontius Pilate Judea gamvaipo ahia, chule Herod Galilee gam leng ahia, asopipa Philip Ituraea le Trachonitis gam, chule Lysanias Abilene gam leng ahi laiyin,
Annas le Caiaphas thempulen ahilhonin, Pathen thu chu gamthip’a Zechariah chapa John hengah ahung lhungtan ahi.
Chuin ama chu Jordan luipang jui kimvel’a gam jousea ahungin chonset suhbeina dinga lung heiya Baptize chan thu alhangsam len, Isaiah themgao thubua;
“Gamthip’a khosam o khat’in pakai lamlen semtohsan koi’yun; Alampi semjang un.
Damkom chengse kidip chama, Mol jouse le lhang jouse kisunem ding ahi; Lamkon chu kisujanga, Aphon a chu kisunam ding ahi;
Chule mi jousen Pathen Huhhingna amu ding ahi, tia kisun bang chun.
Hiti chun aman ama khut’a Baptize chang dinga ahenga che ho mihonpi jah a chun, “Vo gulse son ho, khonunga lunghan hung lhung dinga kona jam ding lungthim koiham napeu-vah?
Hichejeh chun lung heitoh kilomin gadoh-un; chule nalah uva ‘Abraham kapu luiyu aumnai,’ tita hih-un; ijeh- inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Pathenin hiche song hoa kona hi Abraham son sodohsah thei ahi.
Chule tu jeng jongin thingbul tin’ah heicha kikoiya ahitai; chutia chu thingphung aga phalou chengse chu kiphuh lhua meiya kisep lutji ahi,” ati.
Chuin mihonpi chun, “Achutile keihon ipi kabol dingu ham?” tin ana dongun ahi.
Chuin aman adonbut’in amaho jah a, “Sangkhol ni neiyan anei louva chu kihoppi hen; chule anneh neiyan jong chutima chun bol hen,” ati.
Chuin kaidong ho jong chu Baptize chang dingin ahenga ahungun ajah a,
“Mihil, keihonla ipi kabol dingu ham?” atiuvin ahi. Aman amaho jah a,

“Nanghon nakiteppeh kalval’un mia lahbe hihun,” ati. Sepaihon ma adongun, “Keihon jong ipi kabol dingu ham?” atiuvin. Aman amaho jah a, “Alam louvin koimacha acham louvin lahpeh hih-un; jouvin jong mi heh hih-un; chule nalo jat jat’uvah lung lhaiyun,” ati.
Chuin mihon akat jinguva, “Hiche John hi Christa ahi khat tadem?” tia lungthima angaito laitah-un,

John in adonbut’in abonchauva jah a, “Keima vangin twiya Baptize kachan sah nauvin, ahivangin keima sanga hat chungnung jo ahunge, keima akengchot khao sut lham dinga jong kilom kahipoi; amatah chun nangho Lhagao Thenga le meiya Baptize nachansah dingu ahi.
Aman aphol jap ngim sel’a chule achang pang sunga khum dingin akhut’a godal akichoiye; asi vang chu mei mit theilouva agovam ding ahi.
Hiti chun aman til khouna thudang tamtah aseiyin amaho jah a chun Kipana Thupha ahil lhangtan ahi;
ahin Herod lengpa vang chun asopipa Philip inneipi Herodias jal le athilbol phalouho jal’a apho jeh-in,
John chu songkul’a akhumin chonset chunga chonset abol be tai.
Chuin ahitin ahi, miho jouse Baptize achanun Jesu jong Baptize achangin chuin ataovin ahile van akihongin,
chule Lhagao Theng tahsa vouvin vakhu bangin ahung kumlhan achunga achun, chule vana konin o ahung gingin, “Nangma kaChapa deitah nahi; nachungah kalung alhai ta ngeiye,” ati.
Jesu amihil akipat chun ama kum som thum alhingin, mi ngaiton ama chu Joseph chapa ahin, Joseph chu Heli chapa ahin,
Heli chu Matthat chapa ahin, Matthat chu Levi chapa ahin, Levi chu Melchi chapa ahin, Melchi chu Jannai chapa ahin, Jannai chu Joseph chapa ahin,
Joseph chu Mattathias chapa ahin, Mattathias chu Amos chapa ahin, Amos chu Nahum chapa ahin, Nahum chu Esli chapa ahin, Esli chu Naggai chapa ahin,
Naggai chu Maath chapa ahin, Maath chu Mattathias chapa ahin, Mattathias chu Semein chapa ahin, Semein chu Josech chapa ahin, Josech chu Joda chapa ahin,
Joda chu Joanan chapa ahin, Joanan chu Rhesa chapa ahin, Rhesa chu Zerubbabel chapa ahin, Zerubbabel chu Shealtiel chapa ahin,
Shealtiel chu Neri chapa ahin, Neri chu Melchi chapa ahin, Melchi chu Addi chapa ahin, Addi chu Cosam chapa ahin, Cosam chu Elmadam chapa ahin, Elmadam chu Er chapa ahin,
Er chu Joshua chapa ahin, Joshua chu Eliezer chapa ahin, Eliezer chu Jorim chapa ahin, Jorim chu Matthat chapa ahin, Matthat chu Levi chapa ahin,
Levi chu Simeon chapa ahin, Simeon chu Judah chapa ahin, Judah chu Joseph chapa ahin, Joseph chu Jonam chapa ahin, Jonam chu Eliakim chapa ahin,
Eliakim chu Melea chapa ahin, Melea chu Menna chapa ahin, Menna chu Mattatha chapa ahin, Mattatha chu Nathan chapa ahin, Nathan chu David chapa ahin,
David chu Jesse chapa ahin, Jesse chu Obed chapa ahin, Obed chu Boaz chapa ahin, Boaz chu Salmon chapa ahin, Salmon chu Nahshon chapa ahin,
Nahshon chu Amminadab chapa ahin, Amminadab chu Admin chapa ahin, Admin chu Ami chapa ahin, Ami chu Hezron chapa ahin, Hezron chu Perez chapa ahin, Perez chu Judah chapa ahin,
Judah chu Jacob chapa ahin, Jacob chu Isaac chapa ahin, Isaac chu Abraham chapa ahin, Abraham chu Terah chapa ahin, Terah chu Nahor chapa ahin,
Nahor chu Serug chapa ahin, Serug chu Reu chapa ahin, Reu chu Peleg chapa ahin, Peleg chu Eber chapa ahin, Eber chu Shelah chapa ahin,
Shelah chu Cainan chapa ahin, Cainan Arphaxad chapa ahin, Arphaxad chu Shem chapa ahin, Shem chu Noah chapa ahin, Noah chu Lamech chapa ahin,
Lamech chu Methuselah chapa ahin, Methuselah chu Enoch chapa ahin, Enoch chu Jared chapa ahin, Jared chu Mahalaleel chapa ahin, Mahalaleel chu Cainan chapa ahin,
Cainan chu Enos chapa ahin, Enos chu Seth chapa ahin, Seth chu Adam chapa ahin, Adam chu Pathen chapa ahi.
Chuin Jesu Lhagao Theng dimset’in Jordan a konin akilen chule Lhagao puihoiyin gamthip’ah ni som li diabol lhep patep’in aumin ahi.
Chule ni chuchenga chu imacha ne lou ahi; chuin alhin phat’in agil akeltan ahi.
Hichun diabol’in ajah a, “Nangma Pathen Chapa nahile hiche song hi changlhah aso na dingin thu pen,” ati.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “Mihem changlhah jenga hing lou ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman apuitouvin miphet kah louvin vannoi leiset gam jouse avetsah tan ahi.
Chuin diabol chun ajah a, “Hicheng jouse chunga thu neina le aloupina nangma penge; ijeh-inem itile keima eikipedoh a ahitan; kapeh nom nom kapeh ding ahi.
Hijeh chun ka-ang a naboh khup’a chibai neiboh le aboncha nanga hi ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “Akisune, ‘Nangman Pakai na-Pathen chu chibai boh-in lang ama jeng bou houvin,’ tin,” ati.
Chuin Jerusalem a apuiyin chule houin tingvuma adinsah-in, chuin ajah a, “Pathen Chapa nahile hichea pang hin nangma kileh lha jengin.
ijeh inem itile ‘Aman nangma chung changah Avantil ho Nachang dinga thu peh tin, chule
Amahon akhut’uva nadop dingu ahi; Achutiloule songah Nakeng kisuh khanate,’ tin akisune,” ati.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “Nangman Pakai na-Pathen chu lhem patep hih-in, tin akiseiye,” ati.
Chuin diabol’in alhep patepna chengse achaisoh phat’in chomkhat dingin ama chu adalhatan ahi.
Chuin Jesu Lhagao thahat’in Galilee a akile kit tan; hichun akimvel gamtin a chun athu akithangtan ahi.
Chuin akikhopnau in tin ah ahil len mi jouse pachat’in aumtan ahi.
Chuin aseilet doh na Nazareth khoa ahungin; chuin achon ngai bangin cholngah nin kikhopna in’ah alut’in sim dingin adingtan ahi.
Chuin Isaiah themgao lekhabu apeuvin ahi, chuin aman lekhabu chu aphongin ahile hitia kisun lai amudoh-in ahi;

“Pakai Lhagao chu kachunga aume, Ijeh-inem itile aman keima mi vaicha ho jah a, Kipana Thupha hil lhang dinga eitun ahi. Soh changho jah a Lhadohna thu sam le ding le Mitcho ho khomusah dinga, Akigot chepte ho lhadoh dinga Pakai lah thei kum hil lhang dinga eihinsol ahi,” kiti lai chu.
Chuin aman lekhabu chu akhup’in lhacha le khut’a ape kit’in atoutan ahi.
Hichun kikhopna in a mi jousen ama jeng amit lhuh cheh tauvin ahi.
Chuin ajah uva, “Hiche Pathen lekhabu thu hi tuni hin nanasunguvah aguilhung tai,” tin aseipantan ahi.
Hichun abonchauvin ama chu aseiphauvin chule akam sunga soh lungsetna thu chu kidang asa lheh jengun; “Hiche hi Joseph chapa hilou ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Nanghon ‘Louthem nangma ki-boldam in, Capernaum a nathilbol kajah chengseu chu hikomah nangma gama jong hin bol’in,’ ti thulem hi kajah a nati tei dingu hina hi,” ati.
Chuin ama ma man, “Tahbeh a najah uva kasei ahi. Themgao koima ama gam sungah min ajop ngaipoi.
Ahivangin tahbeh a najah uva kasei ahi. Elijah nikho laiya van akikha a kum thum le lha gup gam jousea kel alhah chun Israel lah a meithai tamtah aumin ahi;
chule adang koima henga Elijah kisol louvin Sidon gama Zarephath khoa meithainu henga akisol bouvin ahi.
Chule Elisha themgao umlai chun Israel lah a aphah tamtah aumin, ahinla adang koima kiboldam theng a umpoi. Syria mi Naaman bou chu ahi,” ati.
Chuin amahon thu chucheng ajah phat’un kikhopna insunga mi jouse alung hang behseh jengun,
akipat’un khoa kon chun asondoh-un, abungbua sot lhah dingin akho chen nau koldeh lama chun apui tauvin ahi.
Ahivangin akah uva akihehdoh-in achemangtan ahi.
Chuin a ma Galilee gama khopi khat Capernaum ah achesuh tai.
Chuin cholngah nin miho ahil’in, chule thunei tah a thu asei jeh chun athuhil chu kidang asa lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin kikhopna in a chun thi lha boh vop mi khat aumin, chuin ama chun o sangtah-in asamin.
“Vo Nazareth Jesu nang le keiho ikimat-nau ium am? Nangma koi nahi kahenai: Pathena Theng chu nahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun ama chu aphoh-in, “Thip’in amaa kon chun hungdoh-in,” ati. Chuin thi lha chun ama chu alaiyuvah aheh lhun, su na louvin asunga konin ahung potdoh tan ahi.

Hichun abonchauvin kidang asa lheh jengun, amaho le amaho aki-houvun, “Hiche hi ipi thu ham? Ijeh-inem itile thunei tah le thahattah a lhagao boh ho thu apeh le amaho ahung potdoh jenguve,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin chuche vel gam khotin’ah athu athangtan ahi.
Chuin akipat’in kikhopna in a kon chun apot’in Simon in a aluttai. Chuin Simon nupanu chu hatah a khosih a na ahin, amanu ding chu athumpeh tauvin ahi.
Chuin ama akomah adingin akhosih chu aphoh-in ahile alhatan ahi. Chuin amanu athoudoh paijenin amaho jenlen apangtan ahi.
Chuin nisa lhum konin hivei chom chom veiya na damlou neiho chun ama chu akoma ahinpuiyun ahile, aman a-chung cheh uva akhut angamin aboldam-tan ahi.
Chule thi lha ho jong chu mi tamtah a konin apotdoh-un, “Nangma Pathen Chapa nahi,” tin asamun ahi. Chuin aman amaho chu aphoh thip’in, amahon ama Christa ahi chu ahet jeh-un, thu aseisah tapon ahi.
Chuin khovah kit phat’in apotdoh-in gamthip munah achetan; chule mipi chun ahol’un ahenga chun ahungun amaho adalhah louna dinga lho dingin agou-vin ahi.
Ahivangin aman amaho jah a, “Keiman kho dang danga jong Pathen gam Kipana Thupha kahil lhang le ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche dinga chu hinkisol kahi,” ati.
Hichun Judea gama kikhopna in tin’ah thu ahil lhang len ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, mipin aneh chintouva Pathen thu angai pet’un ama Gennesaret dil len panga dinga ahin,
hichun aman dillen vaokama chun kong ni amun, ahivangin nga man ho chu anapotdoh uva alenu anasop’u ahi.
Chuin ama Simon kong joh a chun alut’in ama chu vaokama kona tol lut jep’in asol’in;
chuin atouvin konga pang chun mipi chu thu ahiltan ahi. Chuin athusei angah phat’in Simon jah a, “Lithuh lam jonin nga man dingin nalen sep lhan,” ati.
Chuin Simon in adonbut’in, “Pipu, jan khovah keiyin kabol’un imacha man louhel kahiuve; ahivangin nangma thusah-in len gahsep lhange,” ati.
Chuin chutia abol phat chun nga atama tam akhu khatauvin alenu chu asedeh jengin ahi.
Chuin amahon kong choma um akikoppi ho chu hunga ahung hu dingun agah jap tauvin ahi. Chuin ahungun akong nin asung dimun ahile alhalut deh deh jengin ahi.
Ahin Simon Peter in hichu amun Jesu khup komah aboh khup’in “Vo Pakai, kakoma konin chedoh-in, ijeh-inem itile keima mi chonse kahi,” ati.
Hichu a-nga matpiu chu ama le aloiten kidang asah behseh jeh-u ahi.
Chule Simon kikoppi Zebedee chapa teni Jacob le John jong chun kidang asa lhonin ahi. Chuin Jesun Simon jah a, “Kicha hih-in; tukala mihem man a napan ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin amahon akongu vaokama ahintoldoh phat’un abonchan adalhauvin anung ajuitauvin ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, ama khopi khat’a aumpet’in veuvin, mi khat apum changa phah aumin; chuin Jesu amu phat’in tol’a aboh khup’in “Pakai nalung ahile neidam thengsah thei nahi,” tin a tao tan ahi.
Chuin aman akhut alhangin atham in, “Kalung ahi, damtheng tan,” ati. Chupettah chun aphah chu apha paihel jengtan ahi.

Chuin aman koima jah a asei louna dingin akham chah-in, “Ahin chen lang thempu gakimusah-in, chule nakibol damtheng thudol chu amaho hettohsah nan Mose thupeh dungjuiyin thilpeh ding dol chu gapetan,” ati.
Achuti jeng vangin ama thudol athangson cheh jengin ahi; chuin mipi atama tam athu ngai ding le anat kiboldam dingin ahung kikhom jiuvin ahi.
Ahin ama chang gamthip muntin’ah achomin achedoh-in agataovin ahi.

Chuin ahitin ahi, hichelai chun ni khat thu ahil pet’in Galilee gam le Judea gama khotina kona chule Jerusalem a kona hung Pharisee ho le danthu hilte ho chu akoma atouvun ahi; chule mi boldam dingin Pakai thilbol theina chun ama aumpin ahi.
Chuin veuvin, mihon mi langthi khat ajalkhun pumin ahinpu’uvin; amahon ama chu put lut’a a-ang a koi dingin agouvin ahi.
Chuin mipi jeh a aput lutna ding kom amu lou phat’un, in chunga akaldoh-un in chung khu cheh pheng vang kah a alupna pumin alailung uva Jesu ang sungah agah khai lhauvin ahi.
Chuin atahsanjeu chu amun, aman “Mipa nachonsetna ho ki-ngaidam ahitai,” ati.
Chuin danthu sun ho le Pharisee hon taitomna thu seipa hi koi koi ham? Pathen tailou chonset ngaidam thei koiham, tin agel pantauvin ahi.
Ahin agelu chu Jesun ahen, adonbut’in ajah uva, “Nalunguva ipi nagel’u ham?
Nachonsetna ho kingaidama ahitai, tile thouvin lamjot’in, ti hoijoh tibaijo am?
Ahoi hita jongle leiset chungah Mihem Chapan chonset ngaidamna thahat aneiye, ti nahetna dingun,” atin; langthipa jah a chun, “Thouvin; nalupna kilah-in lang na-in a chetan kati nahi,” ati.
Chuin hiche pettah chun ama a-ang sunguva athoudoh pai jenin, alupna chu akilah-in Pathen avahchoi avahchoiyin a-in lama achetan ahi.
Hichun kidang asa lheh jengun, Pathen avahchoi yun “Tunin thil kidangtah imu’ve,” atiuvin akicha behseh jeng tauvin ahi.
Chuin hiche jou chun ama apotdoh in ahile amin Levi atiu kaidong khat kaidonna muna atou amun ajah a, “Kanung hinjuiyin,” ati.
Chuin aman ijakai adalhan akipatdoh-in ajuitan ahi.
Chuin Levi chun ama vahnan ama in’ah golvah nasatah abol’in, chule hia chun kaidong ho le midang tamtah-in amaho chu ankong aumpiuvin ahi.
Chuin Pharisee ho le alekha sun teu aseijuite ho chungah aphunun, “Ibol’a kaidong hole chonseho toh naneh khom nadon khomu ham?” atitauve.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in “Ati dam ten louthem angai pouve; adamlouten bou angaiyui;
michonphate kouva hung kahipoi; alung heina dinguva michonsete kouva hungjoh kahibouve,” ati.
Chuin amahon ajah a, “John seijuite bon an angol matchet jiuvin, tao jong a tao jiuve; chule Pharisee hon jong chutin abol’un, nanga hon vang aneuvin adonui,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin Jesun amaho jah a, “Moulang chun aumpi laisea aloite chu an nangolsah thei ngaiyam?
Amavang moulang akomuva kona kipui mang ni hung lhungding ahi, chuche ni le an angol dingu ahi,” ati.

Chuin aman thulem khatma aseiyin ajah uva, “Koiman ponthah asat lhan ponluiya abeh ngaipoi; chuti bol le athah chun asuhset ding ahin, chule chua kona alah ahal jong chu alui chutoh kitoh lou ding ahi.
Chule koiman lengpitwi thah savun peng luiya akhum ngai; chutibol le atwi thah chun peng chu tumkeh-in tin, atwi jong long jal’in tin peng jong mang ding ahi.
Lengpitwi thah chu peng thah a khum ding ahibouve.
Chule lengpitwi lui don’an koiman athah don ding agopoi; ijeh inem itile aluibou atuiye,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, cholngah nin bulei lai ajot’un aseijuiten buvui asih-un akhut’un anoiyun ane jipeh-un ahi.
Ahin Pharisee kim khat’in, “Cholngah nia bol ngailou ibol’a nabol’u ham?” atiuve.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “David le aloiho akeltan ahile, ama Pathen in a alut’in thempu tailou adangin neh ngai lou vetsahna changlhah to alan anen,
chuin aloiho jong apen, hiche athilbol chu nasim khah louvu ham?” ati.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Mihem Chapa chu cholngah ni Pakai ahi,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, cholngah ni chom khat’in ama kikhopna in’ah alut’in thu a hil’in; hia chun akhut jetlang ngoi mi khat aumin ahi.
Chuin danthu sun ho le Pharisee ho chun ahehsetna ding amu theina dingun, ‘Cholngah nia aboldame, aboldam hih-em’ tin achang lhiuvin ahi.
Ahivangin aman alungthimu chu ahen, akhut lang ngoipa jah a chun, “Kipatdoh-in alaiya hung dingdoh-in,” ati.
Chuin Jesun amaho jah a, “Kadoh nahiuve, cholngah nia apha bol angaiha, ase bol angai ham? Lhagao huhhing angai ha, suhmang angai ham?” ati.
Chuin aman amaho chu abonchauvin ave kimvel’in amapajah a chun, “Nakhut lhangin” atin, chuin aman alhangin ahile akhut adamtan ahi.
Ahin amaho athangtom tun tun jengun Jesu chu alonaje he dingin akihoutoh pantauvin ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche lai chun ama atao dingin mol’a akal doh-in; jan khovah-in Pathen henga tang louvin ataovin ahi.
Chuin khovah phat’in aseijuite akouvin, chuin alah uva som le ni alhengin amaho chu aminu jong solchah asahtan ahi.
Simon aman Peter asah jong, chule asopipa Andrew, Jacob le John,
Philip le Bartholomew, Matthew le Thomas, Alphaeus chapa Jacob le Zealot atiu Simon, Jacob chapa Judas.
Chule ama matsah a pang Iscariot Judas hicheng chu ahiuve.

Chuin amaho chutoh ahung kum lhan jangcham’ah adingun, aseijui mipi atam’a tam le Judea gam jouse le Jerusalem a hung kon chule Tyre le Sidon gama twikhanglen pang juiya hung kon mi tamtah jong athu ngai dingle ahiveiyu kiboldam dingin ahungun ahi.
Chuin lhagao boh suhgenthei ho boldam in aumtauvin ahi.
Chuin ama a kona thilbol theina ahung pot’a abonchauva aboldam jeh chun mipi chun abonchauvin ama chu toh khah agouvin ahi.
Chuin ama akhodan aseijuite aven, “Mi vaichate anun nom nahiuve; Ijeh-inem itile Pathen gam chu nang hoa ahi.
Tua gilkelte ho anun nom nahiuve. Ijeh-inem itile nangho nava dingu ahi. Tua kapte ho anun nom nahiuve. Ijeh-inem itile nanui dingu ahi.
Mihem Chapa jal’a min nahot bol’uva Chule nachom khen’uva nahouset tengu le, Chule michonse tia naminu apaidoh tengu le Anun nom nahiuve.
Hiche ni chule thanomun kipah-un kichomun; Ijeh-inem itile veuvin van a nasan dingu kipaman atame; Ijeh-inem itile aputeu apateuvin jong themgaoho Chutobangma chu anabol’u ahi.
Amavang nangho mihao ho nadau ahi; Ijeh-inem itile nanghon lungmonna alhinga naneiyu ahitai.
Nangho tua va ho nadau ahi; Ijeh-inem itile nangho nakel dingu ahi. Nangho tua nuiho nadau ahi; Ijeh-inem itile nangho nalhaset dingu ahi. Chule kajong Naka dingu ahi.
Mijousen na-ochat’uva naseiphat tengu le nadau ahi; Ijeh-inem itile aputeu apateuvin Chutima chu themgao lhem ho chu Anabol’u ahi.
Amavang keiman kathu ngaiho jah a kasei ahi, ‘Nanghon namelmateu chu ngailuvin; nahoteu chu phatbol’un; nagaosapteu chu phatthei boh-un; nataitomteu dingin taopeh-un.
Nabengphe lang khat benga chu lang khat jong dopeh-in;
chule naponlen min nalahpeh le nasangkhol jong alah ding it hih-in.
Nahenga thumchan chu pen; chule nanei nalahpeh a chu thum kitta hih-in.
Min nangho iti bolleu chun nadeiyum, nanghon jong chuti chun bol’un.
Nanghon nangailuteu jeng nangailut’uva ahile ipi pachat nachan dingu ham? Ijeh-inem itile michonse ho jengin jong angailu’va chu amahon angailu’vin ahi.
Chule nanghon nadinguva pha ho jengseh phatna ding bol leu chun ipi pachat nachan dingu ham? Ijeh-inem itile michonse honjong achuti bol’un ahi.
Chule mu kit dinga nakinep nau ho jengseh henga apan lha leu chun ipi thangvahna nachan dingu ham? Ijeh-inem itile mi-chonse hon jong michonse ho hengah ajatma mu kit dingin a pan alhajiuve.
Nangho vangin namelmateu chu ngailu’vin aphatna dingu bol’un, chule mu kit ding kinemlel louvin a pan lhauvin; chutile toh phat man nasan dingu len ding ahi, chule Chungnungpen chate nahi dingu ahi.
Hijeh chun na-Pau mi khoto bangin nanghon mi khotouvin.
Chule mi oimo hih-un, chutile nangho oimoa naum lou dingu ahi; mi themmo chansah hih-un, chutile nangho themmo nachan lou dingu ahi; lhauvin, chutile nangho jong nakilha dingu ahi.

Nanghon peuvin, chutile nangho jong nakipeh dingu ahi; min son chah khet, loh chah khet’in tin letset’in phatetah-in ten tin na-op’uva nasunpeh dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile nanghon nate bang banguva nangho kitepeh ding nahiuve,” ati.
Chuin aman amaho jah a thulem khatma aseiyin, “Mitchon mitcho apui thei ngaiyem? Ani lhon a kokhuh a lhalut lhonta lou ding ham? Ahilpa sangin aseijui achung nungjo poi.
Athemsoh teng vang le ahilpa toh akibang bouve.
Nangma mit’a inkam uma chu ngaito louva ibol’a nasopi mit’a boh them um chu navet ham?

Chule nangman nangma mit’a um inkam mu louva nasopi jah a, “Sopi, namit’a boh them um chu neilahdoh sah-in, iti nati thei ham? Vo mipha lhem, nangma mit’a um inkam chu kilahdoh masah-in, chutengle nasopi mit’a um boh them lahdoh ding chu namu chen ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile thingphung pha a aga phalou agajipoi, thingphung phalouva jong aga pha agajipoi.
Thingphung tin aga a kihea ahi. Ijeh-inem itile min ling phungah theichang aloujipoi, lingboh a jong lengpiga aloupoi.

Miphan a lungsung thil kholna pha a konin thilpha asodoh-in; chule miphalouvin a lungsung thil kholna phalouva konin aphalou asodoh jing ahi; ijeh-inem itile a lungsunga alet’a kona akamin aseidohji ahi.
Chule nanghon kasei thua la chon louva ibola ‘Pakai, Pakai,’ neitiu ham?
Koi hijongle kahenga hunga chule kathusei ngaiya bol’a chu ama chu koi tobang ham keiman nangho vetsah unge.

Ama chu mi in sa a thuh tah-a lei laiya chule abul song chunga phut tobang ahi; chuin twisang alet phat’in chule luidung soh-in in chu hasuh-in asun ahile, guntah a kisa ahijeh chun asulhu joutapon ahi.
Aja a abol louva vang chu mi abul beiya lei chunga in sa tobang ahi; luidung soh-in hasuh-in asun ahile, alhupai jengtan ahi; hiche in chu aset anasa lheh jengin ahi.
Chujouvin aman miho jah a asei ding thu jouse aseidoh phat’in Capernaum ah aluttan ahi.
Chuin aman Jesu thu umchan ajah phat’in ahengah Juda mi upa ho asol’in ahunga asohpa chu ahung damsah dingin athumtan ahi.
Chuin amaho chu Jesu heng alhun un ponthotah-in ataovun “Ama hi hiche hi nabolpeh a lomtah ahi;
ijeh-inem itile aman ivaipiu hi angailu lheh jengin ama tah-in kakikhop nau in jong hi eisahpeh-u ahi,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin Jesu amaho chutoh alhontai. Chuin inkom ageiyin jalamkai javaipo chun agol ho asol’in ajah a, “Pakai, nangma hung kigimsah hih-in; ijeh-inem itile nangma ka-insunga nahung lut ding chu keima chutia kilom kahipoi.
Chuti chu ahin keima jong nangma henga hung dinga kilomin kaki ngaitopi: thu chengkhat jeng cha seiyin, chutile kasohpa dam jeng ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile keima jong mi thuneina noiya um kahin keima noiya sepaiho aumin; chule keiman khat pen pen chu, ‘Chen,’ katile achen; achom khat, Hungin,’ katile ahungin; chule kasoh jah a, ‘Hiche bol’in,’ katile abol jin ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun thu chu cheng ajah phat’in ama chu kidang asan akiheiyin anung jui mipi jah a chun, “Keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, Israel lah jeng a jong hitobang tahsan len kamu khapoi,” ati.
Chuin asolte ho chu a-in’ah akile kit’un ahile, sohpa chu adamin amutauvin ahi.
Chujou jou chun Nain atiu kho khat’a achen aseijuite le mipi nasatah khat toh alhonin ahi.
Chuche kho kotpi phung ageiyun veuvin mithi khat ahung kipun, ama chu anu chapa chang khatseh ahin, amanu la meithai ahin, akho ho mi tamtah-in alhonpiuvin ahi.
Chuin Pakaiyin amanu chu amu phat’in alung ase behseh jengin, “Kap hih-in,” ati.
Chuin aman anaiyin thilong kong chu atham in ahile apuho chu ading tauvin ahi. Chuin aman, “Gollhang, thouvin kati nahi,” ati.
Chuin athipa chu atouvin thu asei pantan ahi. Chuin aman ama chu anu apetan ahi.
Chuin abonchau-vin akichatauvin ahi; chule “I-lah uva themgao chungnung khat asohdoh-e, chule Pathenin amite avil’e,” atiuvin Pathen avahchoi tauvin ahi.
Chuin Judea gam jousea le akimvel gam jouseah achung chang thu chu athang dohsoh tan ahi.
Chuin John seijuiten chuti thu jouse chu ajah a aseitauvin ahi.
Chuin John aseijuite mini akouvin Pakai hengah asol’-in, “Ahung dinga chu nang nahi mong hinam? O-le achom dang khat ka-nga dingu ham?” tin agadohsah-e.
Chuin mite ni akom alhun lhonin, John Baptist in “Ahung dinga chu nangma nahi mong hinam? O-le achom dang khat ka-nga dingu ham? tia nahenga eihinsol lhon ahi,” atilhone.
Hiche pettah a chu Jesun anaho, hisevei ho, chule lhagao gilou vop tamtah aboldama, chule mitcho tamtah lungsettah a kho amusah ahi.

Chuin aman adonbut’in ajah lhonah, ‘Che lhon inlang nathilmu chengse lhon le nathujah chengse lhon John jah a gasei lhon in, ‘Mitchon kho amutai, elbaiyin lam ajot tai, miphah damtheng sah-in aumin, chule na-ngongan kho ajatan, mithisa kaithouvin aumtai, mivaichate Kipana Thupha akiseipeh tai.
Chule koi hijongle keiya kipal lhuhna kom neilou chu anun nom ahi,’ tin gaseipeh lhonin,” ati.
Chuin John thupo ho chu apotdoh phat’un aman mipi jah a chun John thudol asei panin, “Ipi ve dinga gamthip’a chu nachedoh-u ham? Huiyin peng amut ling ham?
Achutile ipi ve dinga ba chedoh nahiuvem? Ponnem kisil mi ham? Veuvin, lultah a kivon ho le nomsatah a um ho khu leng ho in a um ahiuve.
Ahile ipi ve dinga ba nachehdoh-u ham? Themgao ong? Ahi, kaseipeh nahiuve, themgao sanga chungnungjo ahi.
“Keiman kasottol namasang sangah ka-sol’e, Aman namasang sanga nalampi asem ding ahi,“
tia kisun chu ama hi ahi. Nangho jah a kasei ahi, numei sunga peng lah a John sanga lenjo aumpoi; ahinla Pathen gam a aneojo chu ama sangin alenjoi,” ati.
Chuin athu sei ja a mi jouse le kaidong ho John Baptize chansah a Baptize achangun, Pathen them achanun adihsah tauve.
Ahin Pharisee hole danthu themho vang chu ama chansah a Baptize chang louvin Pathenin amaho chunga agot chu alhun khelsah tauve.
Chuti chu ahin tukhanga miho hi ipi toh katekah tadem? Chule itobang mi hiuvam?
Amaho chu kaithel tol’a touva khat’in khat kouva ajah a, “Kuli kamutpeh-u le nalam hih-un; kakau le la nakap pouve,” ti chapang ho tobang nahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile John Baptist ahungin changlhah ne lou lengpi-twi donlou ahin; nanghon, ‘Ama chu thi lhavop ahi,’ natiuve.
Mihem Chapa ahungin anen chule adonin ahile nanghon, ‘Veuvin, neh hat le ju lop, kaidong ho le mi chonse ho jol le gol’ natiuve.
Ahinla chihna chu achaten abonun athemsah nan ahi,” ati.
Chuin Pharisee ho khat’in ama chu nehpi dingin akouvin; chuin ama Pharisee pa in a chun alut’in an ne dingin atoutan ahi.
Chuin veuvin, numei khat khopi sunga chu chonse ahin, Pharisee pa in’ah an nen atouve, ti ahet phat’in songval bom khat thao namtui ahinchoiyin,
a-nungah akengphang bul’ah adingin akap’-in, akengphang chu amit lhin akotsah-in, aluchanga asam chun atheh ngim pantan, chuin akengphang chu achop’in thao chu anutan ahi.
Chuin an nea akouva Pharisee pa chun hichu amun ama changin, “Hiche mipa hi themgao ahin, hiche atongkha nu hi koi hile itobang numei ahi hetah ta, amanu la chonse ahin,” ati.
Chuin Jesun ama chu adonbut’in, ajah a, “Simon najah a sei ding ikhat kaneiye,” ati.
Aman, “Houhil seiyin,” ati. “Sumpa hom mi khat’in sumba mi ni aneiyin; khat pan dangka ja nile som nga abat’in, khatjo pan som nile nga a bat ahi.
Chuin amanin sahna ding aneilhon lou phat’in anin angaidam tai. Chuti ahin koijoh chun ama hangailut joh lhonin tem?” ati.
Simon in adonbut’in, “Kei ngaiton atam ngaidam joh chun, ” ati.

Chuin aman, “Natan dih-e,” ati. Chuin numeinu lama chun akiheiyin, Simon jah a, “Nu-meinu hi namum? Na-inah kahung lut’in nangman kakeng silna ding twi neipepoi, amanu vang hin amit lhin kakengphang asukot’in asamin atheh ngime.
Nangman achop himin neichop poi, amanu vang hin kahung lut til’a pat kakengphang chop atangpoi.
Nangman kalu thao neinupeh poi, amanu vang hin kakengphang thao namtui anui.
Hichejeh chun kati ahi, amanu hin angailut behseh jeh a asetna tamtah chu ngaidama um ahitai; amavang ngaidam lhom chun angailu lhomjin ahi,” ati.
Chuin numeinu jah a chun, “Nachonset ngaidam ahitai,” ati.
Hichun a-ankong umpi ho chun, “Chonset ngaidam ama hi koi hi-nga na?” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman numeinu jah a chun, “Natahsan in nahuhhing ahitai, lung mong tah-in chetan,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, hiche jou chun ama khopi le khote tin’ah avahlen ahil lhang len Pathen gam Kipana Thupha apolen som le ni ho chu akomah aumun;
chule numei phabep lhagao gilou vop dam kit le anat kiboldam ho toh ahiuve. Amaho chu Magdalene atiu Mariam, thi lha sagi potdohna nu toh,
chule Herod neiching Chuza inneipi Joanna toh, Susanna toh, chule numei dang tamtah toh ahiuvin, amaho chun amaho neiya konin ajenun ahi.
Chuin mipi nasatah ahung kikhom khomun kho tin a konin miho ahenga ahung ahungun aman thulem in thu aseiyin.
“Muchi thepa muchi then achen, athe atheleh abang lamsih a achun ahile, min kengin achotphan, chule chunga leng vachaten aloh gamtan ahi.
Abang songlheo chungah achun; chuin akedoh doh-in anom loujeh-in agop paitan ahi.
Chule abang ling lah a achun, chuin ling ho chutoh akhanthan adep mangtauvin ahi.
Chule adang leipha laiyah achun, akhang in ajat ja khat agatan ahi,” ati. Chuin thu chucheng aseiyin, “Angaina ding na neiyan ngai hen,” tin asamin ahi.
Chuin aseijuiten, “Hiche thulem chu i-kiseina ham?” tin adongun;
chuin aman, “Pathen gam thuguh chu nahet dinguva kipea nahitauve; midang ho jah ding vanga mu chu amu’va ahetdoh louna dingu, jah chu ajah uva ahet louna dinguva thulema kisei ahi.
Thulem chu athu hiche ahi: Muchi chu Pathen thu ahi.
Chule lamsih a ho chu athu ja ho ahiuve; chuteng le amahon atahsan louva chule asochat louna dingun diabol ahungin alung sunguva thu chu alah mang peh jin ahi.
Chule songlheo chunga ho chu athu ajah a thanom tah a joppaiho hi ahiuve; amaho hi jung neilou ahiuvin, chom khat atahsan un, chule patepna aum tengle apul lhagam ji tauve.
Chule ling lah a chu hochu hiche ahi, athu ajah nung le achen ahinlai khan kho lungkhamna le haona nomsahna chun adep lih jin aga bulhing jita pouve.
Chule leipha laiya chua hiche ahi, thu chu ajah-in lung kitup tah le phatah-in atuh det’in thoh hat’in aga jiuve.
Chule koiman meivah avah-in bel’in akhu khumji poi; jalkhun noiya jong akikoi jipoi; alut chanin vah amu theina dingun atunna chungah atungji bouve.
Ijeh-inem itile kiphong lou dinga imacha ki-ima aumpoi, chule hetdoh lou ding le kilangdoh lou ding kiselguh imacha aumpoi.
Hijeh chun iti nangaiyum chingtheiyun; ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle aneiya chu kipehbe ding ahi; chule koi hijongle anei louva chu aneiya angaito chasun jong chu ama a kona kilahpeh ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin anu le asopite ahungun ahile mipi jeh chun akom ahung lhung theipouvin;
chuin ajah a, “Nanu le nasopite inpoa adingun nangma namu nomui,” tin aseipeh-un ahi.
Ahin aman adonbut’in amaho jah a, “Kanu le kasopite hiche ho, Pathen thu ngaiya bolte ho hi ahiuve,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, chulai chun ni khat aseijuite toh kongah atouvin; chuin aman amaho jah a, “Dil gal lang khat’a galkaiyu hite,” atin; chuin kong alhauvin akitol tauvin ahi.
Ahin akitol pet’un ama aihmutan; chuin dil’a chun khopihui ahung nungin ahile akongu chu twi adim deh deh jengtan ahile, amaho set to kichatah-in aumtauvin ahi.
Chuin amaho ahenga acheuvin asukhangun, “Pipu, athigam kahitauve,” atiuve. Chuin ama ahung khangin huipile twi kinong chu aphoh-in; hichun hite ni chu atanghel gel’in athip hel tan ahi.

Chuin aman ajah uva, “Hoiba ham natahsan u?” ati. Chuin amaho akichauvin kidang asauvin. khat’in khat jah a, “Hichepa hi hoi koi hita a, hui le twi thu apen ahile, athun anung jeng lhone,” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuin Gerasenes gam alhungun, hichu Galilee gal jontah ahi.
Chuin ama thinglhang akaidoh doh-in khopia kon thi lha vop mi khat’in atoh-in, ama chu sottah pon apon a sil lou, in a jong um lou, lhankhuh lah jenga um ahi.
Ama chun Jesu amu mun a-aosan a-angah aboh khup’in o sangtah-in, “Vo Chungnungpen Pathen Chapa Jesu, nang le kei ipi ikimatnau um am? Nahenga katao ahi, keima neibolgim hih-in,” ati.

Hichu aman ‘Mipa a kon chun hungdoh-in,’ tia lhagaO boh chu thu apeh jeh ahi. Ijeh-inem itile ama chu tamtah vei amat matchetji ahin; chule ama chu anga jiuva, thih khao le bul’a ahen jiu ahi; ahivangin aman akihenna ho chu aphutan in thilhan anomang in gamthip’ah avahmangji tan ahi.
Chuin Jesun “Namin i-ham?” atile, aman “Janel kahi,” ati; ijeh-inem itile asunga chu thi lha tamtah lut ahi.
Chuin aman amaho chu lei onga chea asol louna dingun ama henga ataovun ahi.
Hichun chukom muna chun lhangah vohhon atama tam alhan; amahon chute ho lah a alut dingu aphalna dingin ataotauvin ahi. Chuin aman aphaltan ahi.
Chuin thi lha ho mipa a kon chun ahung potdoh-un vohcha ho sunga chun alut tauvin ahile, vohhon chu halhaiyin alhaiyun kol’ah alhai lhauvin dil’ah alha lut’un athigam tauvin ahi.
Chuin avahhon chuti thusoh um chan chu amu phat’un ajamun khopi sunga le loujaovah agaseiyun ahi.
Chuin ipi thusoh hitam, tia ve dingin ahung potdoh-un; chuin Jesu kom ahung lhungun thi lha potdohna mipa chun pon akisil’a chule lunglima Jesu kengphang koma atou amu’vin akicha lheh jengun ahi.
Chuin amuho chun thi lha voppa chu iti kihuhdoh ahi chu ajah uvah aseiyun ahi.
Chuin Gerasenes ho gam vel’ a miho jousen akomu’va kona achedohna dingin ahenga atao tauvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu akicha behseh jengun ahi.
Chuin ama konga alut’in akile kittan ahi. Ahin thil lha ho potdohnapa vang chun ama koma um ding athum in;

ahivangin aman, “’Na-in lama chen lang Pathenin nangma itobang thil loupi nabolpeh em, hichu gaseilen,” tin asol’in ahi. Chuin akipatdoh-in, Jesun thil lentah abolpeh chu khopumpi jah a lhang phongtah-in asamle tai.
Ahin Jesu akile kit’ in mipin ana lamtouvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho abonchauva ama ngah jinga anaum ahiuve.
Chuin veuvin, amin Jairus kiti mi khat ahungin, chule ama chu kikhopna in vaihom ahi; chuin ama chu Jesu kengphang bul’ah alhun a-in a achepeh dingin atao tan ahi;
ajeh i-ham itile ama chun chanu chang khatseh aneiyin, kum som le kum ni bep ahin, amanu cha chu athi koncha ahi.
Ahin achele mipi chun atomlel lui jengun ahi. Chuin numei khat kum som le kum ni athi longa louthem ho kibolsah a, anei jouse sumanga khat chan jong aboldam jou lou.
anung lama ahungin apon mongkai atham in ahi; chuin chupet tah chun athi lon chu atangpai jeng tan ahi.
Chuin Jesun, “Koiham eithama,” ati. Chuin abonchauvin, “Kathamkhapoi,” ati phat’un, Peter le aloihon, “Pipu, mipin toma neh lei lul’a hi,” atiuve.
Ahivangin Jesun, “Koi ham khat’in eithame; ijeh-inem itile keiya kona thilbol theina thahat potdoh a chu keiman kahet chu,” ati.
Chuin numeinu chun, “Ki-im thei kahipoi,” ti ahen; kihot pum pumin ahungin a-angah aboh khup’in, ijeh a ama atham ahi chule chupettah a adampaihel chu mi jouse ang sungah aseitan ahi.
Chuin aman amanu jah a, “Chanu, natahsan in nadamsah ahitai; lung mongin chetan,” ati.
Aman hiche thu chu aseina laiyin, kikhopna in vaihompa in’a kon chun mi khat ahungin ajah a, “Nachanu athitai; houhil chu cholsah hih-in,” ahung ti.
Ahivangin Jesun hichu ajan adonbut’in, “Olmo hih-in, tahsan poutan; chutile hingdoh ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin a-in chu alhun in Peter, John, Jacob chule chapangnu nu le pa tailou adang koima alutsah pon ahi.
Chule miho jouse chun amanu chu akauvin a-op abeng bengun ahi; ahin aman, “Nangho kap hih-un; ama athia ahipoi, aihmu ahibouve,” atin ahile;
athitai, ti ahet jeh-u chun ama chu anuisat tauvin ahi.
Ahinla aman amanu chu akhut’in atuh-in akouvin, “Boinu, thouvin,” ati.
Chuin alha ahung kile kit’ in ahile chupettah chun athoudoh pai jeng tan ahi; chuin aman amanu chu “Neh ding peuvin,” tin thu apetai.
Hichun anu le apa chun kidang asa lheh lhone; ahivangin aman, hiche thil kibol chu koima jah a sei louna dingin akham chah tan ahi.
Chuin aman som le ni ho chu akou khomin thi lha ho jouse chung le nat boldamna thuneina le thahat apen.
Pathen gam thu hillhang le dingle anaho boldam dingin asol’in,
nakhol jin nauva dingin tenggol ahim, sakhao ahim, chule changlhah le sum hiti ho chu ima kiken hih-un; sangkhol tho ni jong nei hih-un.
Nalut nau in a chun umun, chule chua kon chun potdoh-un.
Chule nalhunsah lou chanuva chu chuche khoa kona napotdoh tengu le hiti ho chu amaho hetsah nan nakengphang uva leivui thing lhauvin,” ati.
Chuin amaho acheuvin, akho khoa Kipana Thupha ahil lhangun ana aboldampeh tauvin ahi.
Hichun Herod lengpan thil kibol jouse chu ajan, alung gim lheh tan ahi. Ajeh chu mi abangin, ‘John athia kona thoudoh kit ahi,’ atiuvin;
abangin, ‘Elijah hung kilah ahi,’ atiuvin; adangse vang chun, ‘Malaiya themgao ho lah a khat thoudoh kit ahi,’ atiuvin ahi.
Herod’in, “Keiman John lu katan tan, ahinla hiche athu kajah hi hoi koi ham?” ati. Hichun ama mu atuptan ahi.
Chuin asolchah ho chu ahung kile kit’un athilbol chengseu chu ama jah a aseiyun ahi. Chuin aman amaho chu apuiyin Bethsaida atiu khopia chun achomin achetan ahi.
Ahivangin mipin hichu aheuvin anung ajuiyun chuin aman amaho chu anasangin, chuin ajah uva Pathen gam thu aseiyin chule boldam ngai ho chu aboldamtan ahi.

Chuin nilhum kon ahitan, hichun som le ni ho chu ahungun, ajah a, “Mipi hi acheuva akho ho le loujao dunga ge na le anneh agakihol theina dingun sol tan; ijeh-inem itile hikoma eiho gamthip’a um ihiuve,” atiuvin ahi.

Ahin aman amaho jah a, “Nanghon neh ding peuvin,” ati. Chuin amahon ajah a, “Keihon changlhah pheng nga le nga ni kalval kaneipouve, kacheuva hiche miho jouse dinga hi neh kagachoh dingu ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile amaho chu mi sang nga jen ahiuvin ahi. Chuin aman aseijuite jah a, “Amaho chu som nga cheng chengin aloi loiyin tousah-un,” ati.
Chuin amahon achuti bol’un abonchauvin atousah-un ahi.
Chuin changlhah pheng nga chule nga chu alan, van lam aven, hite ho chu phatthei aboh-in, aheh bal bal’in; chuin mipi ang a chu luipeh dingin aseijuite thu apen ahi.
Chuin amahon aneuvin abonchauvin avasoh keiyun chuin aneh moh-u anong chengse paipeh som le paipeh ni alohdoh unahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, ama achanga a tao pet’ in aseijui ho akomah aumun; hichun aman amaho chu adongin, “Mipi ho hin keima hi koi ahi eitiuvem?” ati.
Chuin amahon adonbut’un, “John Baptist chu ahi,” atiu; a bang vangin, “Elijah ahi,” atiu; chule adangsen, “Malai themgao ho lah a khat thoudoh ahi, atiuve,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Nanghon la koi ahi, neitiuvem?” atile; Peter in adonbut’in, “Pathen Christa chu,” ati.
Ahivangin aman amaho chu hichu koima jah a asei louna dingun hakham in akhamchah-in;
“Mihem chapa chun thil tamtah athoh a, chule vaipo upa ho le thempu pipuiho chule danthu sun ho paiya uma, chule kithat tei ding, chule nithum ni le kaithouva um thei ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman abonchauva jah a, “Koi hile kanung eijui noma chun ama kingaitom hen lang niseh-in athingpel kiput hen lang kanung hinjui hen.
Ijeh inem itile koi hile ahinna huhhing noma chun achan ding ahi; amavang koi hile keima jal’a ahinna chan a chun ahuhhing ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile min vannoi leiset apumpin neihen lang ama kisumang hen, ahiloule kisuse le ama dinga ipi phachom ding ham?
Ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle keima le kathua jahcha chu, Mihem Chapan ama loupina le Pa loupina chule Vantil theng te ho loupina a ahung tengle amapa chu ajachatpi ding ahi.
Amavang tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, hikoma dingho kimkhat hi Pathen gam amu kahseuva thina tep kha lou ding aumuve,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, chucheng aseikal ni get jen jouvin Peter toh John toh chule Jacob toh apuiyin a tao dingin mol chunga akaltouvun;
chuin ama ataopet’in amaiso adanglam tan, chule aponsil abanin abangin avah lah lah jengin ahi.
Chuin veuvin, mi nin akihoupin; amani chu Mose le Elijah ahilhon in;
loupia hung kilah lhona Jerusalem a thina athoh chai ding thu chu asei lhon in ahi.
Hichun Peter le aumpi ho chu aihmutsoh ngui jengun, ahivangin hah jingin aumun, aloupi le akoma ding mi teni chu amu’vin ahi.

Chuin akikhenpi lhona akoma kona achedoh pet lhonin Peter in Jesu jah a, “Pipu, hikoma iumu hi eiho dingin anome; chule lhambuh thum song ung kate, khat nangma ding, khat Mose ding, chule khat Elijah ding,” ati. Hiche ati chu hetoh louva asei ahi.
Chuin aman chucheng asei pet chun mei lhang khat’in amaho chu ahinle khun; chuin amaho mei lah a alut’u chun akichauvin ahi.
Chuin mei lah a kon chun o ahung gingdoh-in, “Hiche hi ka-Chapa kalhendoh chu ahi; athu ngaiyun,” ati.
Chuin o hung gindoh phat chun Jesu achangin akimutan ahi. Chuin athip beh-un, chulai chun athilmu u chu koima jah a aseipouvin ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, akit nia mol chunga kona akumsuh phat’un mipi a tama tamin ana lamtouvin ahi.
Chuin veuvin, mipi lah a kon chun mi khat’in “Houhil, nahenga katao ahi, kachapa ven, ama hi kachapa chang khatseh ahijeh hin,” tin ahinsam in ahi.
“Chule vetan, lhagaovin amanjin, phulouvin apeng jah jin, chule aheh lhu jin achil phon alhan, asu heh jin lha lel lel’in alhajin ahi.
Chule anodoh dinga naseijuite henga katao le amahon la anodoh joupouvin ahi,” ati.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in “Vo tahsanna nei lou khang lamvai mite, nakomuva itih chan kaumpia, chule kakho ngai ding nahiuvem? Nachapa chu hilama hinpui tang,” ati.
Chuin ahung pet’in thi lha chun aheh lhun nasatah-in avei ngoi jengin ahi. Ahivangin Jesun lhagaoboh chu aphoh-in, chuin chapang chu aboldam in apa apetan ahi.
Chuin miho jouse chun Pathen chungnung loupije kidang asa lheh jengun ahi.
Chutia chu athilbol jouse chu kidang asah pettah-un Jesun aseijuite jah a chun, “Hicheng thu hi nana sunguvah lutsah un, ijeh-inem itile Mihem Chapa chu mihemte khut a kipedoh ding kon ahi,” ati.
Ahivangin hiche athusei chu ahedoh pouve: ijeh-inem itile amahon ahetdoh louna dinguva amahoa kona ki-ima ahin; chule hiche athusei chu ama doh dingla akichauvin ahi.
Chuin alah uva koipen chu alenpen dem, ti angaitouvin ahi.
Ahivangin Jesun alunguva chuche angaitou chu ahen, chapang neocha khat alan akoma adinsahin ajah uva,
“Koi hijongle hiche chapang neocha hi keima mina sanga chun keima eisan ahi; chule koi hijongle keima eisanga chun eihinsolpa asan ahi. Ijeh-inem itile nalah uva aneopen chu ama chu alen ahi,” ati.
Chuin John in adonbut’in, “Pipu, mi khat namina thi lha nodoh kamu’vin, chuin nangma kajuiyu eijui lou jeh-un kakhamtauve.” ati.
Ahin Jesun amaho jah a, “Kham hih-un; ijeh-inem itile koi hijongle nangho dou loupou chu nangho lama pang ahi,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi; ama lah touva a um ding phat alhin konin Jerusalem a che dingin amai ngat changmel’in,
amasangah thangkou asol masan, amaho acheuvin ama dinga gotsa anakoipeh dingin Samaria miho kho khat’ah alut tauvin ahi.
Ahivangin aman Jerusalem a che dinga amai angat jeh chun amahon anasang tapouvin ahi.
Chuin hichu amu lhonin Jacob le John hiche aseijuite ni chun, “Pakai van a kona mei kong ahung lhah a amaho hi akahvamna dingu thu peleu vang nalung ham?” ati lhone.
Ahivangin ama akiheiyin amani chu aphoh-in ahi.
Chuin kho danga achetauvin ahi.
Chuin lampia ache pet’un mi khat’in ajah a, “Nache na chan’ah jui yinge,” ati.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, Sial hon ko aneiyun, chunga leng vachaten jong bu aneiyun, Mihem Chapa vangin alu ngapna mun aneipoi,” ati.
Chuin aman achom khat jah a, “Neijuiyin,” ati. Ahin aman, “Pakai, amasan kachea kapa kagavuina ding thu neipen,” ati.
Hichun aman ajah a, “Mithi hon amithiu kivui nauvin te; nangma chen lang Pathen gam thupha gahil lhangle tan,” ati.
Achom khatman, “Pakai keiman jong nanung juiyinge, amavang amasan kainkote kaga lhahna dingin neilhan,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Mi koi hile langkon tuh ta a kiheiya anung lam vea chu Pathen gama hoi ahipoi,” ati.
Chucheng jou chun Pakaiyin midang som sagi apansah-in, ama che nading khopi chengse le muntin a chun amasang sangah mi ni nin asol’in ahi.
Chuin ajah uva, “Chang at ding atam lheh-in, ahivangin natonga alhome; hichejeh chun achang atna dinga natong ho ahinsoldohna dingin chang neipu henga taovun.
Cheuvin, veuvin ngeihon lah a kelngoi nou banga nangho kasol nahiuve.
Nanghon sumbom ahin, sakhao ahin, keng chot ahin, keng hih-un; chule lampia koima chibai boh hih-un.
Chule in nalutna ding chanuva amasatah-in “Hiche in ahin lung mong lhung hen,” tiuvin.
Chukoma chu lungmon chapa auma ahile nalungmon chu achunga um ding ahi; aumlou vang le nangho henga hung ki le kit ding ahi.
Chule ipi hijongle amahon napehpeh-u chu neuvin, donun; hiche in a chun umun; ijeh-inem itile natongan athaman asan lom ahi.
In khat’a konin in khat’a kichon hih-un. Chule ipi kho hijongle nalutnauva chu min nanasan uva ahile na-anguva akoi chanu chu neuvin.
Chukoma um anaho chu boldamun; chule amaho jah a chun, “Pathen gam chu nakomu alhung tai,” tiuvin.
Amavang ipi kho hijongle nalut nauva chu min nana lhunsah lou vangu le chedoh-unlang akho sung lamlen’uvah
Kakeng phanguva beh nakho sunguva leivui san a katheh lhah khum nahiuve; hijongle Pathen gam ahung naitai ti hi heuvin,’ tin seiyun.
Najah uva kasei ahi, chuni leh chuche khopi thoh sanga chu Sodom thoh oljo ding ahi.

“Ohe Chorazin nada ahi! Ohe Beth-saida nada ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nalah uva thilbol thahatna kidang kibol chengse chu Tyre le Sidon khopia kibol hile sot’a pat chun acheng hon khaopon kisil’in vut lah a touvuntin alung heitauvinte.
Ahinla thupi tan ni le nangni thoh sanga Tyre le Sidon thoh oljo ding ahi.
Nang, Capernaum, van geiya choisanga naum ding ham? Thi khol khul’a kum lha ding nahijo bouve.
Koi hile nangho thu ngai chan chun keima thu jong angai ahi; koi hile nangho pampaiya chun keima jong eipampai ahi; chule keima eipampaiya chun eisolpa jong apampai ahi,” ati.
Chuin chuche som sagi ho chu kipah tah-in ahung kileuvin, “Pakai, nangma minin thi lha ho jong kathu’vin anunge,” atiuvin ahi.
Aman amaho jah a, “Van a kona kolphe banga satan ahung lhah kamui.
Veuvin gul le aipi chonpeh ding le mel mapa thilbol theina jouse chunga chu thuneina kapeh nahiuve; hitia chu imachan nangho nasuhset lou dingu ahi.
Ahivangin lhagao ho nathu’va anun jeh chun kipah louvin, namin u van a akisut jeh chun kipah-un,” ati.

Chuin hiche pettah chun ama Lhagao Thengah hapan akipah-in, chuin. “Kapa, Van le lei Pakai, nangman mi chingte le lungthim themho henga hicheng thu hi na-ima naocha ho henga naphon-doh jeh hin nangma thangvah-e; ahi, Pa, hiti chu nangma lung lhaina lam ahi.
Imajouse ka-Pan keima eipehdohsoh ahitai; chule Chapa chu koi ahi, Pa tailouvin ahepoi; chule Pa-chu koi ahi, Chapa le Chapan aphondohna ho tailou chun koiman ahepoi,” ati.
Chuin seijuite ho lama chun akiheiyin guh thimin, “Nathil-mu chengseu hi namu nau mit chu avangphai;
ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, nangho thilmu hi themgao ho tamtah le leng hon mu atup lheh jiuvin, ahivangin amupouvin ahi; chule nathu jah chengseu hi jah atup’un, ahinla ajapouvin ahi,” ati.
Chuin veuvin, danthu them khat adingdoh-in apatep’in, “Houhil tonsot hinkemlou kanei theina dinga ipi kabol ding ham?” ati.
Chuin a man ajah a, “Danthua ipi kisun em? Nangman iti nasim em?” ati.
Chuin a man adonbut’in, “Nangman nalung pumpin, nalhagao pumpin chule nathanei apumpin le na-lungthim pumpin Pakai na-Pathen chu ngailun; chule nangma nakingailut bangin naheng nakoma ngailun,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Nadonbut dih ta ngeiye, hiti chun bol’in, chutile nahin ding ahi,” ati.
Ahivangin ama them kichan agon, Jesu jah a, “Ahile kaheng kakom chu koiham?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in “Mi koiham khat Jerusalem a konin Jericho a achesuh-in gucha michomho lah atoh khatan, amaho chun apon alahpeh- un, avouvin, athikon in adalha tauvin ahi.
Chuin thempu khat chuche lampia chun achesuh-in agatoh khan, amu phat’in lamsih lang khat’a apeltan ahi.
Chuin chutima chun Levi mi khatma chukom mun chu aphah phat’in ama chu amun lamsih lang khat’a apeltai.
Ahin Samaria mi khat vang chu akhol che na lamah aumna mun chu ageiyin; chuin ama chu amun ahile alung asen,
akoma achen avoh nau maha ho chu thao le lengpitwi asun khumin amaha ho chu atomin; chuin apohpo asa chungah atousah-in jinlhun in’ah apuilut’in ajentan ahi.
Chuin ajingin cheng khat aladoh-in inneipu chu apen, “Ama hi phatechan anajen in, hiche kalval ijat hijongle nasuh mang jat chu keiman kahung kile kit teng nangma sanange,” ati.
Hicheng thum lah a koipen chu gucha michom lah tohpa heng le kom nahisah-em?” ati.
Chuin aman, “Ama akhotopa chu,” ati. Chuin Jesun ajah a, “Chen lang nangman jong chutobang chun gabol’in,” ati.
Chuin acheu le ama kho khat’a alut’in; chuin amin Martha atiu numei khat’in a-in’ah alhunsah-in, chule amanu chun Mariam kiti sopi khat aneiyin.
amanu jong chu Pakai keng khophang bul’ah atouvin athu angaiyin ahi.
Martha vang chu lhachalen apangin akisalel lheh jengin; chuin ama henga ahungin, “Pakai, kasopi nun keima jeng lhachalea eichang lha hi ima nagel lou ham? hijeh chun eikithopi dingin sol’in,” ati.
Ahin Pakaiyin adonbut’in amanu jah a, “Martha, Martha, nangma thil tamtah ngaitoa lung gim nahi;
ahinla ngaichat akhoh chu khatseh bou ahi. Ijeh-inem itile Mariam in chuche aphalai chu akilhen ahitai; hichu amaa kona kilahpeh lou ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin ama mun khat’ah ataovin, ajo phat’in aseijuite ho khat’in ajah a, “Pakai, John in aseijuite taoje ahil bang chun nangman jong keiho neihil’un,” ati.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Nangho natao tengu le, ‘Pa namin kija hen: nagam hung lhung hen.
Ani ania kaneh khop dingu an neipeuvin.
Chule kachonset nau ngaidam in; ijeh inem itile keihon jong eibateu jouse ka-ngaidamui. Chule lhepna a neipui hih-un, tiuvin,” ati.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Nalah uva koipen nahiuvem khat’in jol neihen, chule jan khangkim in ahenga chehen ajah a, ‘Jol, changlhah pheng thum a pan neipen;
ijeh-inem itile kajol khat kholjin kahenga ahung lhunge; ahin keiman a-ang a luipeh ding imacha kaneipoi,’ gati le;
sunga pangin, ‘Neisu gim hih-in; tun kot akikhah tai, chule kachate toh jalkhuna kalum khomui; nangma pe dingin kathou theipoi,’ tia donbut ding a?
Keiman nangho jah a kasei ahi, ajol ahijeh chun thou hen gape hih jong le, athum lun lun jeh chun thouvin tin adei jat chu gapente.
Chule keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, “Thumun kipe ding nahiuve, hol’un namu dingu ahi; kiuvun kihonpeh ding nahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile athum chan achangin; chule ahol’an amun; chule akiuva chu kihonpeh ding ahi.
Chule nalah uva koipen nahiuvem, mipa hiya achapan changlhah athum le song pe dinga? Ahiloule nga athum le nga khel’a gul pe dinga?
Ahiloule ahtui athum le aipi pe dinga?
Hijeh chun nangho bon migiloutah hiuva nachateu thilpha pehje nahet’ule, hiche sanga chun gam chenga van a Pa chun ahenga thumte chu Lhagao Theng apeh lou ding ham?” ati.
Chuin aman thi lha paomo khat anodoh-in, chuin thi lha chu apotdoh phat’in paomopa chun thu aseitan ahi; hichun mipiho chun kidang asa lheh jengun ahi.
Ahivangin alah uva mi kim khat chun, ‘Thi lha ho lengpa Beelzebul vanga thi lha ho anodoh ahi,” atiuve.
Adang kim khatsen ama patep nan van a kona melchihna athumun ahi.
Ahivangin aman amaho lung ngaito chu ahen, amaho jah a, “Gamsung khat ama le ama kidoutoa kichom khen chan chu amang thah jin, insung khat kidou chu alhujin ahi.
Satan jong ama le ama akidoule agam iti dindoh ding ham? Beelzebul vanga thi lha ho anodoh ahi neitiu la ahin,
keiman Beelzebul vanga thi lha ho nodoh kahile nachateuvin koi vanga anodoh jiu hintem? Hijeh a chu amaho cheng chu nangho thutan a pang ding ahiuve.
Ahin keima Pathen khutjunga thi lha ho nodohjia kahi vang le Pathen gam chu nahengu hung lhunga ahitai.
Mihat chun ahem amanchah kimkeiya akivona aintol anga lai chansen anei bit keiyin aumji;
ahivangin ama sanga hatjon abulua ajo tengle akiginna agalvon chu asut lhah pehjin anei alahpeh chu ahomchehji tan ahi.
Koi hile keima lama pang lou chu eidouva ahi; chule eikhop khompi lou chu athecheh ahi.
“Lhagaoboh chu mi sunga kona apotdoh tengle twi beina muntin’ah avah len cholngahna ahol’in chule amuhih-in, ‘Kahung potdohna ka-in ma ma a chun che kit tange,’ ati.
Chuin ahung le akitheh ngim le akijep hoi amun,
chutengle achen ama sanga giloujo lhagao dang sagi agapuiyin; chule amaho chua chun alut’un achengji tauve; chule mipa umchan chu amasa sangin anu nunga akhohjo ji tan ahi,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, aman thu chucheng asei chun numei khat mipi lah a kon chun o sang tah-in ajah a, “Navop a naobu le nangman nachep noi chu anun noma ahiuve,” ati.
Ahinla aman, “Ahinai, ahivangin Pathen thu ja a jopte ho chu anun nomjo ahiuve,” ati.
Chuin mipiho ahenga ahung kikhop khop phat’un aman, “Tulai hiche khang hi gilou ahin, melchihna ahol’un, ahinla Jonah melchihna tailou adang kipe lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Jonah Nineveh mite dinga melchihna ahi banga chu Mihem Chapa jong tulai khang dinga ahi.

Lhanggam lengnun thupi tanna a hiche tulai khang mitetoh hung thoudoh khoma amaho hi themmo ahinchan ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman kolmonga konin Solomon chih thu ngai dingin ahungin ahi; ahin veuvin, Solomon sanga chung nungjo hikoma aume.

Nineveh khopia miho chun thupi tanna a tulai khang mitetoh hung ding khoma tulai khang hi themmo ahin chansah dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Jonah thuhil chun alung aheiyun ahi; ahin veuvin, Jonah sanga chungnung jo hikoma aume.
Mi koiman meivah avah-in ning chong thim’ah akoi ngaipoi, lo jong akhu khum ngaipoi, mi alutte hon avah amu theina dingun atunna chunga atungji bouvui.
Namit chu natahsa vah ahi; namit achima ahile nati apumpia vah ahi; aphat lou vang le nati pumpia thima ahi.
Hijeh chun nasunga vah um thim khat nem kivephan.
Hiche jeh chun natahsa apumpia avah soh keiya athimkom aum louva ahile meivah vahtah-in nasalvah banga vah soh kei ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aseipet chun Pharisee khat’in an nehpi dingin akouvin; chuin ama alut’in an ne dingin atoutan ahi.
Chuin Pharisee chun ama a-an neh masanga akisil lou chu amun adatmo lheh jengin ahi.
Chuin Pakai chun ajah a, “Tun Pharisee ho nanghon khon le lheng apolam nasil ngim nauvin; ahin nasung lamu vang hunam a lah le gitlou adimset’e.
Vo lungthim beiho, apolam sema chun asung lam jong asem hilou ham?
Hijongle asunga thil um chu vaicha gentheite to na dingin peuvin; chutile veuvin, nangho dinga ima jouse athenga ahi.

Ahinla ohe, Pharisee ho nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon pudina le lounakha chule anche louhing jouse som a khat natoh jiuvin; ahinla vaihom dih le Pathen ngailut nadon pouve; ahinla chuti ho jong chu dondadeh louva hicheng hi nabol dingu ahi.
Ohe Pharisee ho nangho nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon kikhopna in’a touna pipen le kailhanga min chibai naboh dingu nadeiyun ahi.
Ohe, nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nangho buikhuh kimu lou mihon he louva achung ajotlejiu tobang nahiuve,” ati.
Chuin danthu themho khat’in adonbut’in, ajah a, “Houhil, nangman chutia nasei chun keiho jong neihou tomu ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman, “Ohe danthu them ho nangho jong nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon poh a kilom lou pohgih mi napohsah-un, nanghon la pohgih chu nakhutjung khatchan jong nakhoiji pouve.
Nangho nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile naputeu napateuvin themgaoho athat’un nanghon alhan’u nasajiuvin ahi.
Chuti chu ahijeh-in hichu ahetoh nangho nahiuvin, naputeu napateu thilbol chu naphasah-uve; ijeh-inem itile amahon amaho chu athat’un nanghon alhan nasauve.
Hijeh chun Pathen chihna-in jong ahiti seiye, “Keiman nahenguva themgao ho le solchah ho sol inge; chule amahon abang athauva a bang a bolset dingu ahi;

chutia chu Abel thisan kisoa pat maicham le Pathen houin kikah a Zechariah athauva athisan kisogei vannoi leiset bul kiphu til a pat’a themgao ho jouse thisan kiso chu hiche tulai khang mite chunga aphu kila ding ahi.
Ahi, nangho jah a kasei ahi, tulai mite chunga bou kila ding ahi.
Ohe, danthu themho nadau ahi! Ijeh-inem itile nanghon chihna kot-heh nalamang un, nangho la nalut pouvin, mi alut dingla nakhamun ahi,” ati.
Chuin chua kona ahungdoh phat chun danthu sun ho le Pharisee hon acham louva thu tamtah seisah a athuseiya mat dingin achangun,
hachang phin in aphin pantauvin ahi.
Hiche pet chun mipi asangja khat’in khat delpha louhel’a ahung kikhop phat chun aman amasapen in aseijuite jah a, “Pharisee te chol’a chun kihong phauvin; hichu phat lhem ahi.
Ahinla akiphongdoh lou ding akisel’a imacha aumpoi, chule hetdoh lou ding imacha aki-ima jong aumpoi.
Hichejeh a chu muthima nasei chan’u chu khovah a kija ding ahi; chule indan sungnunga nabenga guhthima naseiyu chu in chunga kisam ding ahi.
Chule kajol kagol, nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, tahsa that’a akal ima lo thei lou chu kicha hih-un.
Keiman nakichat dingu hil unge; atha nunga damun a lelutna thu neiya ama chu kichauvin najah uva kasei ahi; ama chu kichauvin.
Vasah nga khu paisa ni man a kilhaji lou ham? Ahin alah uva khat jengcha jong Pathen ang’ah haiyin aum khapoi.
Ahin nalu chunguva nasamjang jouseu san a kisim soh keiya ahi, kicha hih-un; vasah sanga nangho lujo nahiuve.
Chule najah uva kasei ahi, koi hile miho ang’a kei eiseidoh chan chu Mihem Chapan jong ama chu Pathen Vantil te ho ang’a aseidoh ding ahi.
Amavang miho ang’a keima eiseilep pa vang chu Pathen Vantil te ho ang’a ama jong kiseilep ding ahi.
le Mihem Chapa chunga thuse sei jouse chu ki-ngaidam ding ahi; Lhagao Theng taitoma vang chu ki-ngaidam lou ding ahi.
Chule amahon nangho kikhopna a vaipo ho heng le thunei ho henga nakai tengu le ‘Ipia iti kadonbut ding ham? Ipi kasei ding ham?’ tin lung kham hih-un;
Ijeh inem itile apettah chule Lhagao Thengin nasei dingu nahil dingu ahinai,” ati.
Chuin mipi lah a kon chun mi khat’in, “Mihil, nei eikihoppi dingin ka-u jah a seiyin,” ati.
Ahivangin aman ajah a, “Mihem kon nangho chunga vaihom le neihoppeh a eisem em?” ati.
Chuin ajah uvah, “Ching theiyun lang neipap kiloset jousea konin kikangseuvin; ijeh-inem itile hao lheh jongle mi anei chu ahinna ahipoi,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah uva thulem khat aseiyin, “Mihao khat gam sungah neh a put behseh jengin;
hichun a man alungthim in, ‘Kalousoh chengse kakoikhom nading munla aumpon, ikalo dingem?” ati.
Chuin aman, ‘Hitin bol inge; kachangsal chengse phe lhang ting asanga lenjo cheh-in sang kate; chule kalousoh jouse le kathil jouse chua chun koikhom inge.
Chule kalhagao jah a, “Lhagao, nangma dinga kum sottah a dinga thil tamtah kikhol ahi; kicholdon lang, nen lang, chan lang nomsa tah-in umin,” tinge,’ ati.
Ahinla Pathen in ama jah a, Vo lungthimbei, tujan a nalhagao nanga kona alethumu ahitai; chule nathil got chengse chu koiya hitan tem?’ ati.
Pathena dinga haolouva ama dinga sum kikhol’a chu chutobang chu ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman aseijuite jah a, “Hijeh a chun nangho jah a kasei ahi, ‘I-kaneh ding hitam,’ tin nahinna dingu le, ‘Ikasil’a kachen ding hitam?’ tin natahsa dingun lungkham hih-un.
Ijeh-inem itile anneh sanga hinkho, nihchen ponsil sanga tahsa thupijo ahi.
Va-ah ho khu ngaitouvin; amahon tu la atupouvin atla a-at pouvin, a pang le chang sal la aneipouve; ahivangin Pathen in amaho khu avahnai. Nangho vacha sanga iti nalutjoh-u hitam!
Chule nangho lah a lungkham hat’a ahinkho tong khat jopsao be thei koi nahiuvem?
Hijeh chun nanghon aneopen bon nabol thei louvu le adang dang dinga ibol’a lungkhama nahiuvem?

Mol-hoi khu iti khan ham, ngaitouvin! Hiche ho khun tongla atong gim pouvin, patla akheh pouvin, ahivangin la keiman kaseipeh nahiuve, Solomon jeng jong aloupina jousea akivon chun hiche molhoi khattoh kibangin akijem hoipon ahi.
Chule jaova hampa tunia uma jinga lhum sunga kileh lutta ding jeng bon Pathen in achutijep le, vo tahsan lhom ho, chusanga chu aman nangho najep joh lou dingu ham?
Chule ipi naneh dingu, ipi nadon dingu, hiche hol hih-un, lung dongin jong um hih-un.
Ijeh-inem itile vannoi namtin in hiti ho jouse chu aholjiuve; ahin hiti ho chu nanghon na-ngaiyu na-Pauvin ahenai.
Hijongle nanghon ama gam hol’un, chule hiti ho chu nakipeh be dingu ahi.
Hon lhom ho, kicha hih-un; ijeh inem itile nangho gam peh ding hi naPau lung ahi lheh jenge.
Nanei chan’u joh un lang mivaicha genthei ho peuvin; chule guchan anaiphah louna, nget jongin anehset louna, van’ah sumbom lui thei lou kisemun, kemlou sum kikhol’un.
Ijeh-inem itile nagou umna a chu nalung jong um ding ahi.
“Natai kigeh-un chule meivah vah jingin umun;
chule moupuina a kona ahunga kot ahinkiu phat phat le hongpai jeng dinga apakai lam kat jinga um mitoh bangun.
Pakai ahunga soh kiging jinga um ahungto ho chu anun nom ahiuve; keiman nangho tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, aman atai akigeh a amaho chu ankong aumsah a ahenguva hunga amatah ajenleuva pang ding ahi.
Chule ama jan dan ni na ahim jan dan thumna ahima ahunga chutobanga chu ahung toa ahile, amaho chu anun nom ahiuve.
Chule itih phat’a gucha ahung ding inneipan ahet hile, kiging jingin tin phet vang dinga ain chu adalhah louhel ding ahi, hichu nanghon heuvin.
Nang ho pha-sademin umun; ijeh-inem itile nagel lou pettah-u le Mihem Chapa chu hung ding ahi.” ati.
Chuin Peter in, “Pakai, hiche thulem chu keiho chang dinga naseiha, mi jouse dinga nasei ham?” ati.
Chuin Pakaiyin, “Ahile neiching tahsan umtah le ching tah, aphatcha achan cheh-u an hoppeh dinga apakaipan ainsunga jouse chun apipua apansah ding koi ham?
Apakai ahung tenga chutia bol ahungto soh chu anun nom ahi.
Nangho tahbeh a kasei-peh nahiuve, ama chu anei jouse chunga apipua apansah ding ahi.
Amavang sohpa chun, ‘Ka-Pakai ahung geiye,’ ti hen, sohnu ho le sohpa ho deng pan ta hen, chule nehen, don hen khamta le,
hiche sohpa chun aginchat lou nitah le ahet lou pettah a apakaipa chu hunga, ama chu tum ni asoa achan tahsan louho lah a akoi ding ahi.
Chule soh apakai lung lam hea, phasadema um lou, chule alung got banga bol lou chu tamtah vei kivo ding ahi;
he louva voh dol’a thil bol vang chu kivo lhom ding ahi. Tamtah kipe henga chu tamtah kibeng ding ahi; koi hile tamtah avopsah uva kona chu tamtah angeh dingu ahi.
Keima vannoi leiset chunga mei leh lha dinga kahung ahi;
tutah jeng jong hin kadohta le katinauve! Ahivangin Baptize chan ding kaneiyin, chuche ka-molso masangsea iti kaningnoh hitam!
Lei chunga chamna lensah dinga hunga nei ngaitou vem? Ahipoi, kaseipeh nahi-uve, asukhen dingjoh a hung kahibouve;
ijeh-inem itile tukal insung khat’a mi nga kikhen toa nin thum adouva, thumin ni adou ding ahi.
Pan achapa adou ding, chapan apa adou ding, nun achanu adou ding, chanun anu adou ding, tehpin amou-nu adou ding, mouvin atehpi adou ding, mouvin atehpi adouva kikhento ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman mipiho jah a jong chun, “Nanghon lhum lama mei soh namu tengu le ‘Go ju ding ahi,’ nati paijen jiuvin; chule ahitah bah jin ahi.
Chule lhang lama kona hui anun le ‘Sa lheh ding ahi,’ natijiuvin; hijong chu achuti jin ahi.
Nangho pha lhem ho, nanghon leiset chung le van umje la nasuto them nauvin, tulai hiti thil um chan iti nasuhto thei louvu ham?
Chule ibol’a nanghon adih lam chu nakingaito louvu ham?

Ijeh-inem itile nahehpa toh thutan vaipo henga nache tengu le lampia ama a kona kiteldohna dingin kihabol’in, achuti loule aman nang thutan vaipo henga nacham louva nakai ding ahi; chule thutan vaihom chun sottol miman khut’a pen natin, sottol miman chun songkul’a nakhum ding ahi.
Kaseipeh nahi, nangman achainakei pai geiya nasahsoh masangsea iti jongle chua kona napotdoh louhel ding ahi.
Hiche pettah chun mi phabep aumun, Pilate’in Galilee miho atha athisan u a-Pathen houna ho toh achopel chu ajah a ahung seiyun ahi.
Chuin a man adonbut’in ajah uva, “Chutobang athoh jeh uva chu amaho chu Galilee miho jouse sanga chonse deh ahiuve, tia na ngaitouvem?
Ahipoi, kaseipeh nahiuve; nangho jong lung nahei louvu le chutobangma chu namanthah dingu ahi.
Chule Siloam insang achima mi som le get adel lih ho jong chu Jerusalem a cheng jouse sanga suh khel neideh a na-ngaitou vem?
Kaseipeh nahiuve, ahipoi, nangho jong lung nahei louvu le chutobangma chu namanthah dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman thulem hiche hi aseiyin ahi: “Mi khat alengpi leiyah theichang phung khat akiphut’in; chuin aga ahung hol’in ahile khat cha jong amupon ahi.
Chuin aman lengpilei lhoupa jah a, “Ven, hiche kum thum sung hin kahungin theichang phunga aga kahung holjin, khatcha la kamupon, phuh lhutan; hiche hin alei man mo aso iding ham?” ati.
Chuin aman adonbut’in ajah a, “Pakai, tu kumin jong hoita din, keiman akimvel laiying ting bong-eh sung inge;
chukal’a aga le apha, aga lou vang le phuh tan,” ati.
Chuin cholngah nin kikhopna in khat’ah aman thu ahil’in ahile,
hia chun veuvin kum som le kum get chamona lha-gao vop numei khat aum in, amanu chu ating bonga achama ding jang thei louhel ahi.
Chuin Jesun amanu chu amu phat’-in akouvin ajah a, “Numei nachamo a kona kilhadoh nahitai,” ati.
Chuin amanu chungah akhut angam in ahile chupet tah chun ajang paihel jengin, Pathen avahchoi tan ahi.

Chuin cholng-ah nia Jesun adamsah jeh chun kikhopna in vaipopa chu alung hangin adonbut’in, miho jah a, “Mi natohna ding ni gup uma chu; hijeh chun hiche sung chun hungun lang kiboldamtau; cholngah ni vang le hungji hih-un,” ati.
Ahinla Pakaiyin ama chu adonbut’in, “Nangho pha lhem ho, nanghon nabong chal’u hi jongle nasanganu hi jongle cholngah nia a-ankonga kona nasut lhah uva twi don a napui chehji hih-um?
Achutile Abraham son hiche numeinu hi veuvin, kum som le kum get satan in ahen hi cholngah nia sut lhah angai hilou ham?” ati.
Thu chucheng asei phat’in adouho chu ajah chatauve, mipi chengse vang chu athilbol loupi jouse jeh chun akipah soh keiyun ahi.
Hijeh chun aman hitin aseiye, “Pathen gam chu itobang ham? Ipitoh kate-kah ding ham?
Ankam mu chang khat mi khat’in alah a ahon a athea, akhandoh a thing asoa, abah lah a chunga leng vacha ho age tobang ahi,” ati.
Chukit man, “Pathen gam chu ipitoh katekah ding ham?
Chol numei khat’in alah a changbong dan thum lah a aboncha apomsoh kahsea avui tobang ahi,” ati.
Chuti chun aman khopi ho le kho neo ho ajot’in thu ahilpeh-in Jerusalem ajonin ahi.
Chuin mi khat’in ajah a, “Pakai, huhhinga um ho hi lhomu vam?” ati.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Kot jim a lut ding kichu’vin, ijeh-inem itile keiman nangho kaseipeh nahiuve, mi tamtah lut kigo ding, ahivanga lut thei lou ding ahi.
“Ahivangin a-inneipu akipatdoh a kot akha nung le nangho polama nadin’uva, ‘Pakai kot neihon un,’ tia kot nakio tengu le aman, ‘Hoilam kon mi nahiu kahepoi,’ ati ding;
chuteng le nanghon, ‘Na-ang sung tah a jong kaneuvin, kadon meu, chule kakhosung lamlen’uva jong neihil meu,’ nati dingu;
chule a man, ‘Keiman nangho hoilam kon nahiu kahepoi; kakoma konin che mangun, nangho chonset bolte ho,’ ati ding ahi.
Abraham, Isaac, Jacob chule themgao ho jouse Pathen gama aumu namu’va. nangho pam a nakiledoh-u namu tengu le, hikoma chu ka le hagel um ding ahi.
Chule solam le lhum lama kon le sah le lhanga kona hunga Pathen gama tou ding ahiuve.
Chule veuvin, anukhah ho chu masa ding chule amasa ho chu nukhah ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche pettah chun Pharisee ho phabep ahungun ajah a, “Hikoma konin potdoh-in, che mangtan; ijeh-inem itile Herod’in tha dingin natup’e,” atiuve.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Cheuvin lang chuche sial jah a chun gaseiyun, ‘Ven, keiman tuni le jinga thi lha ho kanodoh a anaho kadamsah ahi, athum ni le kachaisoh ding ahi.
Ahoi hijongle tuni le jinga chule akit ni le kache na dinga kachepeh ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile Jerusalem louva themgao thi thei ahipoi,’ gatiuvin.
“Vo Jerusalem, Jerusalem, themgao ho that le ahenga kisolte ho songa sep lih, ahpi’n anoute alha noiya a-op khum banga keiman jong nachate ijat vei op khum dinga kagot hitam! Ahin nangho nanom pouve.
Veuvin, na-inu chu akamhel dinga nangu kidalhah peh nahitauve; chule kaseipeh nahiuve, ‘Pakai min a hungpa chu anun nome,’ nati masang seuva keima neimu lou dingu ahi,” ati.
