Chuin ahitin ahi, cholngah nin Pharisee ho pipu khat in’a an ne dingin achen, amahon ave-lhi jingun ahi.
Chuin veuvin amasanga chun thongpohvei mi khat aumin ahi.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in danthu them ho le Pharisee ho jah a thu aseiyin, “Cholngah nia boldam angaiha hilou ham?” ati.
Amaho la athip beh-un ahi. Chuin ama ama chu alan aboldamin, chuin achesah tan ahi.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Nalah uva koi nahiuvem, acha ahim; abongchal ahim twikul’a lha lutta le, cholngah nia agaloidoh pai jeng lou ding ham?” ati.
Chuin amahon hicheng chu adonbut thei kit tapouve.
Chuin akikouhon atouna pha pha alhenu amu phat’in thulem khat aseiyin ajah uva,
“Nangho mi khat touvin moupuina golvahna a nakou tengu le touna pipen’ah tou hih-un; ajo le nangho sanga ja umjo akou um khan tin.
nani lhona nakoupa lhon chu hungin tin najah a, “Hichepa hi mun ot’in” ati ding ahin; chuteng le nangma jachat puma anoi nungpen a natou ding ahi.

Amavang nangma nakikou teng le chen lang anem pen a touvin; hiti chu hile nakoupa ahung teng le najah a, ‘Jol sangjep’ah tou tang’e,’ ti khat’in tin, hiteng chule ankonga natoupi jouse maiya chu choi’at’a naum ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile ama kichoisang jouse chu kisunem ding ahi; chule ama kineosah a chu choisanga um ding ahi,” ati.

Chuin aman akoupa jah a, “Nangman sun hi jong le jan hijongleh golvah nabol teng le najol nagol jong, nasopiho jong kou hih-in, na-inkote le naheng nakom mihao ho jong kou hih-in; ajo le amahon jong nangma kou khauvin tin sadoh get’unte.
Ahin Golvah nabol teng le mivaicha, mi tikimlou, elbai, mitcho koujo bouvin;
chule nangma nanun nom ahi; ijeh-inem itile amaho chun lesahna ding ima aneipouve; ajeh chu midih ho tho kit teng le nangma nakisah ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin ankonga atoupiho khat’in hiti ho chu ajan ajah uva, “Pathen gama changlhah ne dinga chu anun noma ahi,” ati.
Ahin aman ajah a, “Mi koiham khat’ in jan golvah loupitah abol’in;
ama chun mi tamtah akouvin, chuin an neh phat’in aman akouho chu, ‘Hungun, tun ijakai aphasadem cheh ahitai,’ ti dingin asohpa asol’in ahi. Chuin amaho chu tha khat tah-in anathu phauve.
Amasa-pen pan ajah a, ‘Keiman lou kachon ka-chea kagavet lou akhoh-e, katao ahi neilha ongin,’ ati.
Chuin khatpan, ‘Kei-man bongchal to nga kachon, aphat aset patep dinga che ding kahi, katao ahi, neilha ongin,’ ati.
Chuin khatpan, ‘Kei-man ji kaneiyin hijeh chun hung thei ponge,’ ati.

Chuin sohpa chu ahungin hiti ho chu apakaipa henga alhut’in ahi. Chutah-in inneipu chu alung hangin asoh-pa jah a chun, ‘Chedoh loiyin khosung lamlen le khopi sung tho kah juiya gachen lang, mi vaicha, mi tikimlou, chule mit-cho, elbai hikoma gapuilut’in, ati.
Chuin sohpa chun, ‘Pakai, neithupeh bangin kabol’in, ahivangin mun a-ong nalaiye,’ ati.
Chuin Pakai chun sohpa jah a chun, ‘Nangma lam lhong le daipamah chen lang ka-in adimna dingin, miho gajol lut tei teiyin.
Kaseipeh nahi, kami kouho chu khat chan jong kagolvah an atep khah lou dingu ahi,” ati.
Hichun mipi hon tamtah amatoh alhonun; chuin ama akiheiyin ajah uva,
“Koi hijongle kahenga hunga apa, anu, aji, achate, asopiho, asopinu ho chule ama hinkho jeng jong itcha louhel’a bol lou chu kaseijui hithei lou ding ahi.
Koi hile athingpel kiput lea kanung hin jui lou chu kaseijui hithei lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile insang sah ding goan touva, ‘ijat lut ding ham, chule ajojou ding hi na ajo jou lou ding ham?’ tia sutoh masa lou nalah uva koi nahiuvem?
Ama chun abul phutdoh hen jouta hih le, ija kiheam, amuho jousen ama chu nuisat’in tin.
’Hichepan asapanin ajou joutapoi’ ti get’unte.
Ahiloule leng khat leng chom khat toh akisatto dingan asat dinga hung mi sang som ni chu sang soma ajo ding hina ajolou ding ham, ti touva geltoh masa lou dinga koi ham?
Ajo lou dinga ahile khat chu gamla aumpet’in kichamna thutep thum dinga palai asol ding ahi.
Hitobanga chu nangho lah a jong anei chengse nuse louva chu kaseijui hithei lou ding ahi.
“Chi hi aphai, ahivangin chi jeng jong tamta hen lang hile ipia ki-alsah ding ham?
Leining dinla aphapon, bong-eh din jongla aphatna umlou ahitan, min hichu pam lama apaidoh jin ahi. Angaina ding na neiyan ngai hen,” ati.
Hichun kaidong ho jouse le michonse ho jouse athu ngai dingin ahengah ahung naiyun ahi.
Chuin Pharisee ho le danthu sun hon, “Hichepan michonse ho aloiyin amahotoh an ane khome,” atiuvin aphun gel tauvin ahi.
Chuin aman amaho jah a thulem hiche hi aseiye.
“Nangho lah a koi nahiuvem, kelngoi ja neiya alah a khat aman le amanglou som ko le ko chu gama dalha a avahmang khat chu amudoh kahsea hoi louva?
Chule amudoh tengle kipah tah-in alengkouva apujin;
chule in ahung lhun teng le agol ho le ainheng ho akou khomin ajah uva, ‘Neikipa piuvin; ijeh-inem itile kakelngoi manga chu kamutai’ ati.
Kaseipeh nahiuve, chutobang chun alung hei ding khoh lou michonpha som ko le ko sanga michonse khat lungheiya vana kipana um ding ahi.
“Ahiloule numei koiham dangka som neiya khat amansah le meivah dea chule in theh a amudoh kahsea gunchu tah a hol lou dinga?
Chule amanun amudoh tengle agol hole ainheng ho akou khomin, ‘Neikipapiuvin; ijeh-inem itile kadangka mansah chu kamutai,’ atijin ahi.
Kaseipeh nahiuve, chutobang chun Pathen Vantilte ang’ah michonse khat lunghei chungah kipana aumjin ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman, “Mi khat’in chapa ni aneiyin;
chule aneojopa chun apa jah a, ‘Hepa, kagou chan ding chu neipen,’ ati. Chuin anei chu ahoppeh tan ahi.
Chuin ni chom khat jouvin aneojopa chun a bonchan achom khomin khol gamla tah khat’ah achen; chuin aman chukoma chun anei chengse chu kinomsah nan asumang soh tan ahi.
Chuin aboncha asuh mang phat’in chuche gama chun kel nasa tah alhatan ahile, hichun ama chu alhasam pantan ahi.
Chuin ama achen chuche gam miho khat agabel’in; chuin amapa chun avoh vah dingin alou lama asol’in ahi.
Chuin voh neh imaho chu neh a oiva ding ago lheh jengin, koimanla apepon ahi.
Chuin akhahdoh phat’in, ‘Kapa in’a asoh thalah ho khujatpin neh khop le nehval changlhah neiya, keimala hikoma gilkel’a thi ding kahi!
Keima kipat’ing ting kapa henga cheng ting ajah a, “Pah, van douna le nangma mitmun kachonsetai;
kei nachapa tihoi kahitapoi; nasoh thalah ho khat bangin neisemin.” gatinge,’ ati.
Chuin ama akipat’in apa henga ahungtai. Ahin ama gamlatah ageina laiyin apan amun, alung asen alhaijel’in, angonga achun achop chuh chuh jengin ahi.
Chuin achapa chun ajah a, “Hepa, keima van douna le nangma mitmua kachonsetai; nachapa tihoi kahitapoi; nasoh thalah ho khat bangin neisemin,” ati.
Ahivangin apan asoh ho jah a, “Pon phapen tah galah doh loiyun silpeh-in, chule khutjem akhut’a bupeh-un, chule kengchot sepeh-un.
Chule bongnou kivah thao chu hinlauvin that’un, chule neuhiten nom satah-in umu hite.
Ijeh-inem itile kachapa athisa hing kit ahin; amasangsa kimu kit ahi,’ ati. Chuin nop abol pantauve.
Hiche chun achapa lenjo chu louva um ahin; chuin ahunga in kom ahung naiyin, ima kitum gin le lam gin ajan;
chuin aman asoh ho khat akouvin, ‘Hikhu ipi bol’a hiuvam?’ tin adongin ahi.
Chuin aman ajah a, ‘Nanaopa hunga ahile napan damsel’a amukit jeh a bongnou kivah thao chu atha ahi,’ ati.
Hichun ama alung hangin in’a che ding anomtapon; ahin apa apotdoh-in agajol’in ahi.

Ahivangin aman apa adonbut’in, ‘Ven, keiman kum hijat hi nangma kajenin, khatvei, cha jong nathu kapal lhahna aumpoi; ahivanginla kagol ho toh golnop kabolna dingin kelnou khatcha jong imatih-in neipe khapoi.
Ahin hiche nachapa noti ho koma nanei chengse ne manga sumang hel’a hi ahung phat’in bongnou kivah thao nathapeh-in ahi,’ ati.
Chuin apan ajah a, ‘Chapa, nangma kakoma um jing nahi chu; chule kanei jouse nanga hichu.
Hiche nanaopa vang hi athisa hing kit ahin; amangsa kimu kit ahi; hijeh a chu nom satah le kipah tah a ium dingu ahi,’ ati.
Chuin aman aseijuite jah a jong hiche hi aseiye. “Mihao tah khat’in neiching aneiyin, ama chun anei asumange, tin ahenga aheh tauvin ahi.
Chuin aman ama chu akouvin ajah a, ‘Hiche nachunga thu kajah hi iti thu ham? Naneichin sutoh soh keiyin neipen; ijeh-inem itile tukal’a neichinga napan thei lou ding ahitai,’ ati.
Chuin neichingpa chun ama changin, ‘Kapakaipan neichinga kapan eihaisah ahitan; ipi ikati ding hitam! Lei lai dingla katha ahatpon, thum dingla kajah chan.
Neichinga kapan eihaisah teng le mihon a-ina eilhunsah na dingun, kabol ding chu kahetai,’ ati.
Chuin aman apakaipa sumba ho chengse chu akouvin amasapenpa jah a; Nangman kapakaipa ijat nabat’em?’ a tile; aman, Thao te na ja khat thao,’ ati.
Chuin neiching chun ajah a, ‘Nalekhasut hinlan lang tou loiyin som nga sunin,’ ati.
Chuin adang khat jah a, ‘Nangin ijat nabat’em? atile; aman ‘Suhlou chang dan ja khat’ ati. Chuin aman ajah a, ‘Nalekhasut hin lan lang som get sunin,’ ati.
Chuche chondih lou neiching chun chingthei tah a abol jeh chun apakaipan apahcha tan ahi; ijehinem hiche vannoi leiset chate hi amaho khang mite dingin khovah chate sangin aching jouve.
Chule kaseipeh nahiuve, ‘Chondih louna sumin jol le gol kisemun, sum chu abei tengle tonsot’a chenna chu amahon nachensah na dingun.
Koi hijongle themcha chung a tahsan um chu tamtah chunga jong tahsan aumjin; themcha chung chondihlou chu tamtah chunga jong chondihji lou ahi.
Chondih louna sum chunga bon tahsan naum louvu le sum tah kon nangan seuva nachinsah dingu ham?
Mi danga chunga bon tahsan naum louvu le nangho chu kon napeh dingu ham?

Soh lo-nei koiman pakai ni akop theipoi, Ijeh-inem itile khat hotbol’in tin khat angailut ding ahi; ahiloule khat’a hakaiyin tin, khatjoh anahsahmo ding ahi. Nangho Pathen le sum soh nahikop thei lou dingu ahi,” ati.
Chuin sum ngailua Pharisee hon hicheng chu ajauvin ama chu anelpeh-un ahi.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Nangho mi mitmua kichonphatsah bou nahiuve; ahivangin Pathenin nalungu ahenai; hijeh chun mi lah a choi’at a um chu Pathen mitmua thet umtah ahi.
Danthu le themgao ho thu chu John um geiya chu uma ahin; chuche kal’a chu Pathen gam Kipana Thupha hi kihil lhang ahin; mitin chua chun thahat sanin alut cheh-ui.
Ahivangin danthu halsi cha khat manthah sangin van le lei kitolmang abaijoi.
“Aji da a achom dang kichenpi chan chu ajonga ahi; chule ainneipun ada numei kichenpia jong chu ajonga ahi.
“Tun mihaotah khat aumin, ama chun ponsandup le tupat ponnem akisil in loupitah-in niseh-in nomsa tah-in aumjin;
chule ati pumpia ti-na veiya chule chuche mihaopa dokhanga kona lhajah anmal chu neh a oiva noma amin Lazarus atiu khat akotbul’ah alupsah-un;
chule uichahon ati-na ho chu ahung leh jiuvin ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, khut dopa chu athitan ahile Vantil hon ahung pomangun Abraham ang’ah akoitauve; chuin mihaopa jong chu athitan ahile avuitauve.
Chuin thikhol khul’a ama genthei theiya akibol athoh lel’in akhoda le gamlatah a Abraham le a-anga tou Lazarus amutan ahi.
Chuin aman agah samin, “Kapa Abraham, neilungset’in Lazarus chu akhut jung muh twiya dekot henlang kalei dedap dingin hinsol’in; ijeh-inem itile keima hiche meikongah gimthoh-in kaum e,” ati.
Ahivangin Abraham in, “Kachapa, nangin nahinlai chun thil pha namun, hiche bang chun Lazarus hin thil phalou amun, hichu geldoh-in; tuvanga ama hikoma lungmong tah a uma nangma gimthoh a um nahitai.

Chucheng kalval’in jong keiho le nangho ikah uvah onghom lentah kikoidet ahin, chenom jongle hikoma kona nangho umna lama koima che thei lou; chule chua kona jong keiho lama koima hung galkai thei lou ahi,’ ati.
Hichun aman, ‘Kataove, hepa sopi pasal nga kaneiyin;
amaho khu hikom nat thoh gimna muna hi ahung louna dingun, amaho hettohsah dingin Lazarus chu kapa in’a sol’in,’ ati.
Ahinla Abraham in, ‘Ahil’uva Mose le themgao ho a um nauve; amaho thu chu ngaiyu hen,’ ati.
Chuin aman, ‘Ahipoi kapa Abraham, mithi lah a mi khat mong ahenguva ache le bou alung ahei dingu ahi,’ ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, ‘Amahon Mose le themgao ho thu angai louvu le mithi lah a mi khat thoudoh jongle tahsan den pouvinte,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin aman aseijuite jah a, “Kipal lhuh um lou thei ahipoi, ahinla kipal lhuhsahpa chu ada ahi.
Hichepa chun hiche aneocha ho lah a khat akipal lhuhsah sangin angong a sumhei song kikhai hen twikhanglen’ah kileh lut le ama dinga phajo ahi.
Nang ho kichih theiyun, nasopi achonset le phoh-un; chua alung aheiya ahile ngaidam un.
Chule ama nachunga ni khat sunga sagivei achonset’a chule sagivei nahenga ahung kiheiya, ‘Kakisih-e,’ atile, ngaidamin,” ati.
Chuin solchah hon Pakai jah a chun, “Katahsan u khansah ben,” atiuve.
Chuin Pakaiyin, “Nanghon ginchatna ankam mu techa naneiyu hile hiche thing theimi phung hi ‘Kibotdoh-in lang twikhanglen a kiphut’in,’ tileu chun nathu’va nung ding ahi.
“Ahinla nangho lah a koi nahiuvem, asohpan lou kaiya ahiloule gan chinga louva kona ahung le, “Tutah-in hungin ankong’ah touvin,” ti dinga?
Chutia titah sanga ‘Kaneh ding an neigotpeh-in, keiman kaneh lou kadon jou kahsen natai kigeh-in lang neijenin; chujou le nangin naneh a nadon ding bou ahi,’ atijoh lou ding ham?
Chuche sohpa chun thupeh dungjuiya abol jeh a chu apakaipan apachat ngaiyem?
Chutobanga chu nanghon jong nakithupeh cheng-seu nabol jousoh tengu le, ‘Soh phachom lou kahiuve, kabol ding dol bep kabol’u ahi,’ tiuvin,” ati.
Chuin ahitin ahi, Jerusalem jon a achen Samaria le Galilee gam ajotpeh-in ahi.
Chuin ama kho khat’a alut’in miphah som in anakimutopin, amaho chu gamla tah a adingun.
“Pipu Jesu,nei-lungset’un,” tin hasap tah-in asamun ahi.
Chuin aman amaho chu amu phat’in ajah uva, “Cheuvin lang thempuho gaki-vetsah tauvin,” ati. Chuin a hitin ahi, acheu le adam theng patauve.
Chuin alah uva khat chun adamtheng tah chu ahet phat’in akinunglen o sangtah-in Pathen avahchoiyin ahi.
Chuin akengphang bul’ah aboh khup’in athangvah tai; ama chu Samaria mi ahi.
Jesun adonbut’in, ‘Som kisutheng hilou ham? Mi ko hoilamba ham?
Hiche chidang namdangpa tailou adang ho Pathen vahchoi dinga hung kinung lea kimu lou ong,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Thouvin chetan; natahsanin nadamsah hel ahitai,” ati.
Chuin Pathen gam itih a ahung lhun ding Pharisee hon adongun ahile, aman adonbut’in, “Pathen gam chu mutheiyin ahungpoi.
Veuvin, hikom’ah ahiloule khukomah kiti lou ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile veuvin, Pathen gam nalah uva aume,” ati.
Chuin aman aseijuite jah a, “Nanghon Mihem Chapa hinlai nikho ho khatvei namu nom dingu, ahivanga namu lou dingu, hitobang nikho chu hung lhung ding ahi.
Chutengle veuvin, khukomah tia najah uva asei dingu ahi; ahivangin nangho che hih-un, amaho nung jong jui hih-un;
ijeh-inem itile kolphe vannoi kolmang lang khat lama aphet’a kolmong lang khat geiya asalvahji bang hi Mihem Chapa hung ni jong hi ding ahi.
Ahivangin hiche masanga chu thil tamtah athoh theiya chule tulai mite paiya um tei ding ahi.
Chule Noah hinlai thilsoh um chan bang chu Mihem Chapa nikho jong le hi ding ahi.
Noah konga alut ni gei chun amahon aneuvin adonun, akichengun chule akichensah-un; chuin twisang ahung lenin, abonchauvin asumang heltan ahi.
Chutobangma chun Lot hin laiyin jong asoh-in, mihon aneuvin, adonun, thiljoh thil choh abolun, aphut’un, chule in asauvin;
ahivangin Sodom khoa kona Lot apotdoh ni tah-in vana konin mei le kath ahung lhan abonchauvin asumang heltan ahi;
hiche tobanga chu Mihem Chapa hung kiphondoh ni jongle hiding ahi.
Hiche ni chule in chunga uma insunga athil uma chu kilah dingin kum hih hen; chutima chun louva uma jong hung kinung le kit da hen.
Lot inneipi chu geldoh-un.
Ahinna bitkeiya huhdoh hol chan chun achan ding ahi; chule ahinna chan a chun bitkeiya akihuhdoh ding ahi.
Kaseipeh nahiuve, chuche jan chule mi ni jalkhun khat’a luma khat chu kila a khat chu kida lha ding ahi.
Numei ni sumhei khat’a goi khoma khat kila a khat kida lha ding ahi.
louva um te mi jong khat kila khat kida lha ding ahi“]ati.
Chuin amahon adonbut’un ajah a, “Hoiya em, Pakai?” atiuve. Chuin aman, Thilong umna a chu muthong kikhom ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin amaho lhadah louhel’a tao jing jeng ding ahi, ti hetsahnan ajah uva thulem khat aseiyin;
“Khopi khat“a Pathen ging lou mihem jong ja lou thutan vaihom khat aumin;
chuche khopia chun meithainu khat jong aumin; amanu chu thutan vaihompa henga chun ahung jin, ‘Kakilungdoupi chunga phu neilahpeh-in,’ tin ahung sei mat chet jingin ahi.
Chuin chom khat chu anom hih-in; ahivangin ajo phasah-in a ma changin akihouvin, ‘Keiman Pathen kagin louva, mihem jong kaja lou vangin;
hiche meithai nun eisuh lung gim jing jeh hin aphu lahpeh maitange, achuti loule hung jing intin eisuh lungvai ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin Pakaiyin, “Thutan vaihom chondih loupa chun ipi aseiyem ngaiyun.
Chule achunguva lungde sot jeng jongle amilhen ho sun le jan a ama kou kou ho phu chu Pathenin alah lou ding ham?
Kaseipeh nahiuve, aman gang tah a phu alah ding ahi. Ahivangin la Mihem Chapa ahung tengle vannoiya hin tahsan ahung tohna dingem?” ati.
Chuin michonpha ki ngaitoa ama kitahsana midang imacha sah lou ho jah a jong thulem hiche hi aseiye.
“Mi ni houin a Pathen lhai dingin ache lhonin; khat chu Pharisee ahin chule khat chu Kaidong ahi.
Pharisee pa chu adingin hitin ataovin ahi, ‘Vo Pathen, keiman nangma kathangvah-e, keima midang ho banga hunam ala ale chondih lou, jonga, chule hiche Kaidong tobang jong hi kahipoi.
Keiman hapta khat sungin neivei an ka-ngol jin; kamu jouse hopsoma hop khat kapeji,” ati.
Kaidongpa vang chu gamlatah a adingin amit jong vandah nom louvin, ‘Vo Pathen, michonse keima hi neilungset’in, tin a-op achum achumin ahi.

Kaseipeh nahiuve, khatjopa sang chun hichepa chu them changin aumin ain a achesuh tai; ijeh-inem itile koi hile ama kichoi sang chan chu kisunem ding; ama kineosah bou chu choisanga um ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin mihon aman atham dingin naosen ho jong aheng’ah ahin puiyun; ahin seijuiten amu phat’in amaho chu aphoh-un ahi.
Ahivangin Jesun amaho chu ahenga akouvin “Chapang ho chu kahenga hung sah-un, jada hih-un; ijeh inem itile Pathen gam chu hitobangte hoa bou ahi.
Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, koi hile chapangneo tobanga Pathen gam sang lou chu itinama jongle chua lut louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin vaipo khat’in adongin, “Houhil pha, tonsot hin kemlou channa dinga ipi kabol ding ham?” ati.
Chuin Jesu’n ajah a, “Ibol’a apha neiti ham? Pathen khatseh tailou koimacha apha aumpoi.
Thupeh chengse, ‘Jon bol hih-in, tol that hih-in, gucha hih-in, thujouvin mi heh hih-in, nanu napa jabol’in, ti chu nahenai,” ati.
Chuin aman “Hichengse chu kachapan laiya pat’a kahin nitpeh ahitai,” ati.
Chuin Jesun hichu ajah phat’in ajah a, “Nalhin lelna khat aum nalaiye; nanei chengse joh-in mivaicha genthei ho hoppeh-in, chutile van a gou nanei ding ahi; chule hungin lang kanung hinjuiyin,” ati.
Ahin aman chucheng ajah phat chun mihaotah ahi jeh chun alung nommo lheh jengtan ahi.
Chuin Jesun ama chu amun, mihao ho hi Pathen gama alut’u iti hahsat hitam!
Ijeh-inem itile mihao Pathen gama alut sangin heo-bil homa sangongsao lut abaijoi,” ati.
Chuin chuche asei ja ho chun, “Chuti ahile koi huhhinga um jou ding ham?” atiuvin ahi.
Ahivangin aman, “Mihem dinga hithei lou chu Pathen dinga hithei ahi,” ati.
Chuin Peter in, “Vetemin, keihon kaneiyu kadalhauvin nanung ka-hinjui tauve,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, Pathen gam jal’a a-in, aji, asopite, anu, apa, achate hindalha a chu,
tu hinlai sunga ajat tamtah mube lou le khonung hinkhoa tonsot hin kemlou chang lou dinga koima aumpoi,” ati.
Chuin aman som le ni ho chu apuiyin ajah uva, “Veuvin, Jerusalem jonin ichetouvui, chule themgaohoa kona thu kisun jouse chu Mihem Chapa chunga kichaisoh ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile chidang namdang ho khut’a pehdoh a um ding, chule elbol’a uma jachatna tah a aboldingu, chule chil aset khum dingu,
chule avoh uva, chule atha dingu; chule ani thum nile thoudoh kit ding ahi,” ati.
Ahivangin amaho dinga ki-ima ahijeh-in hiti ho chu khatcha jong angainaje ahepouvin, ipi kiseiya ahi jong ahepouve.
Chuin ahitin ahi, Jericho anaiyin mitcho khat lam pamah touva khutdo aumin;
chuin lampia mipi ache chu ajan, “Hichu ipi ham?” tin adongin ahi.
Chuin “Nazareth Jesu chulama chu chea ahi,” tin aseipeh-un ahi.
Chuin aman, “Jesu David chapa, keima neilungset’in,” tin asamtan ahi.
Chuin amasanga che ho chun thip beh a um dingin aphoh-un; ahivangin ama chun, “David chapa neilungset’in,” tin ahasap cheh tan ahi.
Chuin Jesu adingin, ama chu ahenga pui dingin thu a pen; chuin ama akom ahung gei phat’in,
aman adongin, “Keiman nangma i-lo leng nalung ham?” ati. Chuin aman, “Pakai, kho mu leng kati,” ati.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, “Kho mutan; natahsan in nadamsah ahitai,“
atile, chupettah chun kho amupai jengin, anung ajuiyin, Pathen avahchoi avah choiyin; chuin miho jouse chun amu phat’un Pathen avahchoi tauvin ahi.
Chuin ama alut’in Jericho lailung ajot’in,
hichun veuvin, amin Zacchaeus atiu mi khat aumin; chule ama chu kaidong pipu ahin, mihao ahi.
Ama chun, “Hoipen khu Jesu ahidem?” tin mu tei agon, ahivangin ama minem ahijeh-in mipi jeh chun amu theipon;
Chuin ama masang lama ana lhaijel’in ama anave dingin theiba chungah anakal’-e. Ijeh-inem itile aman hilam chu aho ding ahi.
Chuin Jesu chukom mun chu ageiyin agahven ajah a, “Zacchaeus, hung kum loiyin, tunia na-in a kalhun ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin ama ahung kum loiyin kipah tah-in a alhunsah tan ahi.
Chuin hichu amu phat’un, “Michonse in a lhungin ache taget’e,” atiuvin abon chauvin aphuntauve.
Chuin Zacchaeus adingdoh-in Pakai jah a chun, “Ven Pakai, kanei jouse akeh khat mivaicha genthei peng kate; mi koiya hile lepthol’a kalah aum le ajat li lenge,” ati.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, “Tu nin hiche in’a hin huhhinga alhungtai; ijeh-inem itile ama jong hi Abraham son ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile amangsa chu holdoh a huhhing dinga Mihem chapa hung ahi,” ati.
Chuin mihon hicheng thu chu angai pettah-u chun Jerusalem anaitah jeh ule Pathen gam chu chupettah a chu kilangdoh pai jeng dinga angaito jeh-u chun aman aseiben thulem khat aseiyin;
hijeh chun aman ahiti seiye, “Milun-tah khat leng changa chule hung kile kit dingin khol gam latah a achen,
ache kon chun asohte mi som akou khomin mina som apen ajah uva, ‘Kahung kahsen hiche hin anakiveiyun,’ ati.
Ahivangin agam miten ama ahotbol un anunga palai asolun, ‘Kachunguva leng changa vaipo dingin hichepa hi kanom pouve,’ agah tisah tauve.
Chuin ahitin ahi, ama alengchan a ahung kit phat’in sum apeh asohte ho chun ipipi ijat aveikanum, ti hetna dingin amaho kouna ding thu apetan ahi.
Chuin amasapa chu ahungin a-angah, ‘Pakai na mina chu mina som kaveikan-e,’ ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, ‘Nabol aphai, soh pha; nangma themcha khat chunga tahsan naum jeh chun kho som chungah vaipon pangin,’ ati.
Chuin aban a pa chu ahungin ajah a, ‘Pakai, na mina chun mina nga kaveikan-e,’ ati.
Ama jah a jong chun, ‘Nang jong kho nga chunga vaipon pangin,’ ati.
Chuin khatpa ahungin, ‘Pakai ven, na mina chu hiche hi ahi, ultheh pon a kachun a kakoihe ahi;
ajeh chu nangma mikhel nahin, nakoina lou pouvah nala-doh jin, natuna lou pouvah na-at jin ahile, nang kakichan,’ ati.
Aman, ‘Vo nang soh gilou, nakama thupot dungjuiya nathu katan ding ahi, kakoina louva kalahjia, katuna louva ka-atji nahet ahi.
Chuti-an kasum chu ibol’a sum kholpungna a nanakoida ham? Chutile keiman kasum a thoitoh kilahtha tadinga.’
Chuin aman akoma ding ho jah a chun mina chu lahpeh-un lang mina som neipa chu petauvin,’ ati.
Chuin amahon ajah a, ‘Pakai aman mina som anei nai,’ atiuve.
‘Najah uva kasei ahi, aneichan a chu kipe ding ahi; aneilou vang chu anei chasun jong chu ama a kona kilah mangpeh ding ahi.
Hiche achunguva kavaipoh ding nomlouho eimelmah ho vang hi hikoma hinpuiyun, ka-ang sunga that’un,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuin chucheng asei jou chun Jerusalem lam jonin ama alamkaiyin achetou tauve.
Chuin ahitin ahi. Olive atiu mol’a Bethphage le Bethany ahung nai phat’in aseijuiho mi ni asol’in,
namasang jon lhona khosunga khun lut lhonin; nalut lhon le sangan nou kihen koima touna khah lou laihel namu paijen lhon ding ahi; hichu sut lhonin lang hinkai lhonin.
Chule, ‘Ibol’a nasut lhon ham? tia khat tou nadong lhona aum le ‘Pakaiyin manna nom aneiye’ tilhon in,” ati.
Chuin akisol teni chu ache lhon in ahile, ajah lhona asei bang bang chun aga mu lhonin;
chuin asut lhon le aneiten ajah lhona, “Sangan nou chu ibol a nasut lhon ham?” ati.
Chuin ama nin “Pakaiyin manna nom aneiye,” ati lhone.
Chuin Jesu henga ahinkai lhonin, chuin amahon aponu sangan nou chunga chun aphauvin, achunga Jesu atousah-un ahi.
Chuin achele amahon aponu lam dunga aphauvin ahi.
Chuin ama ahung naiya Olive lhang kumlhahna ageiyin aseiyuite mipi chu hapan akipah athanom un thil bol kidang dang abol amu chengseu jal chun o sangtah-in Pathen avahchoiyun.
“Pakai min a hunga lengpa anun nome, van’ah cham leng hen, chungnungpen’ah loupina hi hen,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin mipi lah a kon chun Pharisee ho kim khat’in ajah a, “Houhil naseijuite phoh-in,” ati.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Najah uva kasei ahi, hite ho thip leu song ho ao doh ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin ahung naiya khopi chu amu phat’in akacham in.
“Ohe, nangmatah-in tuni hin lung monna thu hi kihettave le chun! Tunla nahet louna dinga ki-ima ahitai.
Nagalteuvin nakimvela kul aset sanga naum kimvel’a naum chah dingu.
nasunga nachate toh nangma leiset toh kikibanga abol’a nalah a song khat chunga khat umlou hel’a alha dingu nikho nachunga hung lhung ding ahi; hichu nakivil laiyu nahet loujeh ahi,” ati.
Chuin ama houin’ah alut’in thil joh ho chu anodoh panin, ajah uva.
“Ka-in chu taona in hi ding ahi, tin akisune; ahin nanghon gucha michom kokhuh-in nasem tauve,” ati.
Chuin niseh le houin a chun ahiljin ahi. Ahin thempu pipuiho le danthu sun ho chule miho pipuho chun ama suhmang nading ahol’un;
ahivangin mipi chengse chun aboncha ama thu angaiyuva ama jenga akai jing jeh-u chun alonaje ding ahol mouvin ahi.
Chuin ahitin ahi, chulai chun ni khat aman hou ina thupha ahil lhanga miho thu ahil pet’in thempu pipuiho danthu sun ho toh upa ho ahenga ahungun ajah a,
“Ipi thuneina a hiti ho hi nabol ham? Koiham hiche thuneina napea hi? Neiseipeh-un.” atiuve.
Chuin aman adonbut’in ajah uva, “Keiman jong nangho thu khat dong ing kate, neiseipeh-un;
John Baptize chansah chu van a konha, mihema kon ham?” ati.
Chuin amaho akingai touvin, “Van a kon ahi, tileu hen la, ‘Ibol’a ama natahsan louvu ham?’ tin tin;
mihema kon ahi, tileu hen la, miho jousen songa eise dingu ahin; ijeh-inem itile amahon John chu themgao ahi tia ajopsoh-u ahi,” akitiuvin ahi.
Chuin amahon, “Hoiya kon ham kahepouve,” tin adonbut tauve.
Chuin Jesun amaho jah a, “Achutile ipi thuneiya hicheng kabol ahi, keiman jong seipeh deh pou vinge, ati.
Chuin aman miho jah a hiche thulem hi asei pantan ahi. “Mi khat’in lengpilei abol’in aleilhouho khut’a apedoh-in sottah um dingin mi gam danga achetan ahi.
Chuin aga lhun phat’in aman asoh khat leilhouho henga, amahon lengpileiya ga chu ama ahinpeh dingun asol’in; ahinla leilhouho chun ama chu avouvin khutgoh keovin akilesah tauvin ahi.
Chuin aman soh khat asol nalaiyin, ama jong chu avouvin jachat umtah-in abolun agoh keovin asol mang tauve.
Chuin athumna asol kit tan ahile ama jong chu ana vouvin, polam a apaidoh tauvin ahi.
Chuin lengpilei neipa chun, “I-kalo ding hitam? Kachapa deitah hi sol inge. Ama hi anajabol khat’un te,’ ati.
Ahivangin leilhouhon amu phat’un amaho le amaho akihouvin, ‘Ama hi agou lo dinga ahi; hungun agou lo ding chu eihoa ahi na dingin ama hi that’u hite,’ akitiuvin.
Chuin lengpilei po lama lama akaidoh-un athat tauvin ahi. Hijeh chun lengpilei neipa chun amaho chu i-lon tem?
Ama hungin tin aleilhouho chu sugamin tin lengpilei chu midang petante,” ati. Chuin amahon hichu ajah phat’un, ‘Chuti hen,’ atiuve.
Ahin aman amaho chu aven,” Achutile: “Insa hon adeimoa apaiyu song chu, Aninga songpi penin apangtai,” tia kisun hi iba ham?
Koi hijongle chuche song chunga lhu chan chu ahal hal’a chip ding ahi; chule koi hile achunga chuche song chua chu leivui banga kithejal ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin danthu sun ho le thempu pipuihon hiche thulem asei chu amaho gotna a asei ahi chu aheuvin, chupettah a chu achunga khut lhah ding agouvin; ahinla miho chu akichauvin ahi.
Chuin amahon achang lhi jingun athuseiya themmo chan a gam vaipo thunei nale thu noiya peh doh theina din-gin chonpha lim lhemin changlhi phabep khat asol’un ahi.
Chuin amahon ajah a, “Houhil, nangman dih tah a naseiya mi nahil ahi, chule koima mai ve louhel’a Pathen lampi chu nahil ahi, hichu ka-heuve.
Caesar kai kapeh-u hi dan ngai hina hilou ham?” tin adongun ahi.
Ahivangin aman alungthim bol’u chu ahen amaho jah a,
“Denarion khat neivet sah-un, Koi lim le koi min chong am?” atile; amahon “Caesar a,” atiuve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Achutile Ceasar a chu Caesar peuvin lang Pathen a chu Pathen petangu,” ati.
Chuin amahon miho ang sunga athu seiyin amanthei tapouvin athu donbut chu adatmo lheh jengun athip behtauvin ahi.
Chuin mithi thokitna aumpoi, tia Sadducee ho phabep ahenga ahung ajah a,
“Houhil, ‘Koi hile sopi nei khat touvin ji aneiya cha nei louva athi le asopipa chun ajinu chu op hen lang asopipa ding chun chi khaipeh hen,’ tin Mose’n lekha eisutpeh-u ahi.
Aphai, ucha pasal sagi te khat aumun amasa penpa chun ji aneiyin cha beiyin athitai.
Chuin aban banin aban a pan, chuin athumna pan numeinu chu jin aneiyun; chuti chun asagiuvin chabeiyin athi tauvin ahi.
Akhonna-in numeinu jong chu athitan ahi.
Ahile thokitna a amanu chu alah uva koipen ji hitan tem?
Ijeh- inem itile asagiuva amanu chu jia anei soh keiyu ahi,” atiuve.
Chuin Jesun ajah uva, “Hiche vannoi leiset chate hi akichengun chule chen jong akichensah un;
ahin chuche khanga hoi le athia kona thoudoh hoiya kiseiho vang chu akicheng tapouve. chen jong akichensah tapouve.
Ijeh-inem itile amaho thi kit theita lou ahiuve; ijeh-inem itile amaho chu Vantilte tobang ahiuve; chule tho kit chate ahijeh-u chun Pathen chate ahiuve.
Mose’n jong hamboh thua chun, ‘Pakai chu Abraham Pathen, Israel Pathen, chule Jacob Pathen,’ ati chun mithiho kaithouvin aumui, ti aphongdoh e.
Ama athiho Pathen hilouvin ahingho Pathen ahijobouve. Ijeh-inem iti le mi jouse ama dinga hing ahi cheh-e,” ati.
Hichun danthu sun ho a bang bangin adonbut’un, “Houhil, nasei apha lheh jenge,” atiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile amahon ama hiche kal chu ima adong ngam tapouvin ahi.
Chuin aman amaho jaha, “Christa David chapa ahi,” iti kiti ham?
Ijeh inem itile David’in alabua: Pakaiyin ka-Pakai jah a, Keiman namelmate chengse Nakeng chotpha kanei sah masangsen
Kajet lamah tou jingin,’ ati.
Hiti chun David’in ama chu Pakai ati: achuti le achapa iti hi thei ding ham?” ati.
Chuin mi jouse jah-in aseijuite jah a,
“Sangkhol choltah ki-ah a kholai len noma chule kailhanga min chibai aboh ding le kikhopna in le golvah na a touna pipen deiya;
meithaiho in bah gama chule alhema sottah tah taojia danthu sun ho a konin kihong phauvin; amaho chu themmo chang chungnung ding ahiuve,” ati.
Chuin ama akhodah-in ahile mihao hon sumdolna boma athilto alelut’u amun,
chule hia chun meithai vaicha khatman jong sumsan nongsi peh ni alelut amun ahi.
Chuin aman, “Tahbeh a kasei ahi, amaho dang jouse sangin hiche meithai vaicha nun atam lelut pen’e;
ijeh-inem itile amahon aneival’a atouva alelut’u ahin, amanu vang hin ahinna aneisun alelut jeng ahi,” ati.
Chuin mi phabep khat’in houin thu song phatah tah le thilto khoma akijep hoi chu aseiyun ahile, aman
“Nanghon namu u hicheng hi hikoma hi song suhchim louva khat chunga khat kise thom him him um louhel ding ahi, hitobang ni chu hung ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin amahon adongun, “Ahile Houhil, hicheng chu itih le hiding ham? Chule hiho chu ahung sodoh ding phat melchihna ipi hintem?” atiuve.

Chuin aman hi tin aseiye; “Lhep lhah a puimanga naum louna dingun kichih theiyun; keima minin hungun tin, ‘Keima ama chu kahi; chule phat anaiye,’ ahung ti dingu ahi; hijongle amaho nung chu jui hih-un.
Chule nanghon gal kisat le thunoh najah tengu le tija hih-un; ijeh-inem itile hicheng chu hungsoh masa tei ding ahi; ahivangin chupettah chu achaina hipai jeng loulai ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Vai khat le vai khat, gam khat le gam khat hung kidouvin tin;
chule ling nasatah tah hung kihot intin, chule mun chom mun choma kel lha a chule gamna hise hung leng ding ahi; chule van a kona kichat tijat umtah le hetna nasatah hung umding ahi.

Amavang thil hicheng chu ahung sodoh masanga amahon nachunguva akhut alhah uva nabolset dingu akikhop nau le songkul’a napeh doh dingu chule keima min jal’a leng ho le gamvaipo ho ang a nahin kailut dingu ahi.
Hettohsahna naneina dinguva hicheng chu hung sohdoh ding ahi.
Hichejeh chun iti donbut ding nagel masah louna dingun nalung uvah kiset’un.
Ijeh-inem itile namelmaho jouseuvin nadoudal thei lou nau le nanel lhah thei louna dingu kam le lungthim themna kapeh dingu nahiuve.
Ahivangin nanu u napau le nasopiu na-inko chule najol nagol’u chu napedoh uva hung pang ding ahi; chule nalah uva a bang bang ahin thasah dingu ahi.
Chule keima min jal’a nangho mi jouse hot’a nahung um dingu ahi.
Ahivangin nalu chunguva nasamjang khat chau jong mangthah lou ding ahi.
Nanghon thoh hat’a nalhau nakihuhdoh dingu ahi.
Amavang Jerusalem galmin aum kimvel teng vang le aman ni anaiye, ti heuvin.
Chutengle Judea gama um chengse thinglhang gamah jam uhen; chule khopi sunga uma chu potdoh hen; chule gama um ho chu asunga lut dau hen.
Ijeh-inem itile thu kisun jouse guilhun sohna dinga hichu phulah phat hiding ahi.
Ahin ohe, hichelai chule agaiya le nao noi chepsah ho adana dinguve! Ijeh-inem itile gam leiset chunga hesoh genthei khoh tah le hiche mite chunga hi lunghanna chu ding ahi.
Chule amaho chemhema lou ding, chule chitin namtin lah a gal-hinga kikai mang gam ding; chule chidang namdang te nikho lhin kahsea Jerusalem hi chidang namdangte chotpha a um ding ahi.
Chule nisa, lhathah, chule ahsi hoa melchihna hung um ding; chule twikhanglen kitum le kinon jeh a lei chunga namtin lung donga umte ho chunga hesohna hung um ding;
Vannoi leiset chunga thilsoh ding lungkhamna le kichat’a miho haisam ding, ijeh-inem itile van thahatna ho chengse kihot lingsoh ding ahi.
Chutah le Mihem Chapa chu thuneitah le loupi chungnung tah a meiya ahung amu ding ahi.
Ahivangin thil chucheng ahungso kipat teng le khodah-un lang chunglam veuvin; ijeh-inem itile nakilhatdoh nadingu anaiye,” ati.
Chuin aman amaho jah a thulem khat aseiyin. ‘Theichang le thing dang jouse khu veuvin;
ajih adotdoh namu tengu le nipi anaitai, ti naheuve.
Chutobang chun nanghon jong hicheng chu aguilhun namu teng le Pathen gam anaiye, ti heuvin.
Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, aboncha aguilhun masangsea hiche khang guiya mite hi mang lou ding ahi.
Van le lei mang ding ahin; keima thu vang mang lou ding ahi.
Amavang kihong phauvin, achuti loule an motneh neh le jukham chule hinlai khan kho ding thu ngaito nan nalungu lontin chuche ni chu thang bangin phulou helouvin nachunguva hung chu phung get’inte.
Chuche ni chu vannoi leiset gam jousea cheng mi jouse chunga chu ding ahi.
Hijongle gam jousea kona nasochat jouna dingu le Mihem Chapa ang a nadin jouna dingun imatih chanin kiging jingin umun lang tao jingun,” ati.
Hichelai chun aman niseh le houin a thu ahiljin, chule jan le apotdoh jin Olive mol’a agageh jin ahi.
Chule miho jouse chu athu ngai dingin jingkah le ahung hung jiuvin ahi.
Chuin kalchuh kut atiu cholsolou changlhah kut chu anaitan;
chuin thempu pipuiho le danthu sun hon ama chu atha theina dingje aholtauvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile miho chu akichauvin ahi.
Chuin som le ni lah a Iscariot atiu Judas sunga chun Satan aluttan ahi.
Ama chu ache mangin thempu pipuiho le houvaipoloi ho toh ama chu amaho amatsah theina dingje chu akihoutauvin ahi.
Chuin amaho akipah-un ama chu sum peh dingin atep tauvin ahi.
Hichea chun ama anomin, chule mipi umlou petcha aman ama chu amaho henga pehdoh a matsahna thei ding agomkom aholtan ahi.
Chuin kalchuh kut’a kelngoi thana chol solou changlhah nikho chu ahung lhungtan,
chuin aman Peter le John asol’in “Che lhonin lang kalchuh kut ineh dingu gago lhonin,” ati.
Chuin amanin, “Hoikoma gago lhon leng nalung ham?” ati lhone.
Aman ajah lhona “Ve lhonin, nangni khopi sunga nalut lut lhon le twibel pua mi khat toh naki suhto lhon ding ahi; ama nung chu jui lhonin alutna in’ah lut lhonin.
A-inneipa jah a, ‘Houhil’in nangma, kasejuite toh kalchuh kut an kanehna ding, mun chu hoilai ham?’ ati, agati lhonin.
Chule amapa chun indan chungnung lentah gotsadem khat navetsah lhon ding ahi, hikoma chun anago lhontan” ati.
Chuin amani ache lhonin aman ajah lhona asei bang bang chun agatoh lhonin kalchuh kut agago lhontan ahi.
Chuin aphat alhinin ankong aumtan, chule solchah ho chun aumpiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Kathoh gim masanga nangho toh kalchuh kut an neh khom ding hi katup lheh jenge.
Ijeh-inem itile nangho jah a kasei ahi, Pathen gama hiche hi aguilhun masangsea kaneh lou ding ahitai,” ati.
Chuin aman khon chu asangin athangvah jouvin, “Hiche hi kilah-un lang kihomun;
ijeh inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, Pathen gam hunglhun kahsea keiman tukal’a lengpiga twi kadon lou ding ahitai,” ati.
Chuin changlhah alan athangvah-in aheh bal bal’in amaho chu apen, “Hiche hi nangho dinga kipea katahsa ahi; keima neihet jingna dingun hiche hi bol’un,” ati.
Chuin chutima chun khon chu alan a-anneh jouvun, “Hiche khon hi kathisan a kitepna thah nangho dinga kisodoh chu ahi.
Ahivangin la veuvin, eipedoh a pang dingpa khut chu dokhan a hin keitoh kaum khom e.
Mihem Chapa chapa chu akigon banga chonpeh ding ahi; ahivangin apedoh a pang mipa chu adana-e !” ati.
Chuin amahon alah uva chutobang thilbol ding chu koipen ahi dingu akidong totauvin ahi.
Chuin alah uva koipen chu achungnung pen in akiseidem, tia kinelna asohdoh tan;
chuin aman ajah uva, “Chidang namdang ho leng ho khu achunguva alalta lheh-un; chule achunguva thuneiho khu phatna bol akitiuve.
nangho vang nachuti lou dingu ahi; ahin nalah uva alenjo chu aneojo bangin umhen, chule apipen chu lhacha le bangin umhen.
Ijeh-inem itile ankonga tou le alhacha le koijoh lenjo am? Ankonga toujoh chu hilou ham? Ahinla keima nangho lah a lhacha le bangin kaume.
Ahivangin eikitepna a eiumpi jingpeh nangho nahiuve;
chule ka-Pan keima eigotpeh banga kagam sunga kadokhan chunga naneh a nadon theina dinguva keiman nangho gam khat kagotpeh nahiuve.
Chule nangho lal touna a natou uva Israel phung som le phung ni thu natan dingu ahi.
Simon, Simon, ven chang kilhah chil banga lhah chil dingin Satan in nathum e, ahivangin natahsan bei louna dinga kataopeh nahitai.
Chule nangman nalung nahei kit nung le nasopite ho jong naphudet ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Pakai, nangmatoh songkul le thina chetha dinga kigosadema um jing kahi,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Peter, kaseipeh nahi, nangman neihet hi thumvei neiseilep masangsea tunia ah khong lou ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Keiman nangho kengchot se lou, sumbom keng lou, chule sakhao keng louva kasol’uva chu ima nalhahsam nau umji am” atile; amahon, “Aumpoi,” atiuve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Tu vangin sumbom nei neiyan kiken hen, chutima chun sakhao jong kiken hen; chule chemjam nei lou louvan asangkhol joh’hen chemjam khat kichoh hen.
Ijeh-inem itile kaseipeh nahiuve, ‘Ama michonseho toh kisimtha ahitai, ‘tia thu kisun chu kachunga soh tei ding ahi; ijeh-inem itile keima chungchang thudol chengse kichaisoh ding ahitai,” ati.
Chuin amahon, “Pakai, hikoma chemjam ni aume,” atiuve. Aman, “Hichu aphaset’e,” ati.
Chuin ama chonna ngai bangin apotdoh-in Olive lhangah achetan; aseijuiten anung nung ajuiyun ahi.
Chukom mun chu alhun phat’un ajah uva, “Lhep’a nalhah louna dingun taovun,” ati.
Chuin ama songse phahna chan khat ache chonin adilsun ataovin.
“Hepa, naphasah le hiche khon hi kakoma konin chon mangin ahivangin keima lunggot bang hilouvin nangma lunggot bangjoh hihen,” ati.
Chuin van a konin Vantil khat ahung kilah-in thahat ahungpen ahi.
Chuin aman na asa behseh jengin guntah-in atao kit tan; chule thisan aloma tol’a va-lha bangin, a-ul thisan in along jengtan ahi.
Chuin atao jouvin athoudoh-in aseijuite henga ahungin ahile, amaho lungkham a ana ihmut lhuh-u ahungtoh in, ajah uva.
“Nangho ibol’a ihmua nahiuvem? Lhepna a nalhah louna dingun thouvun lang taovun,” ati.
Aman chutia asei pettah chun veuvin, mipi hon khat ahungin solchah som le ni lah a Judas atiu chu ahung lamkaiyin; chuin ama chun Jesu chop dingin akom ahin naiyin ahi.
Ahin Jesun ajah a, “Vo Judas, Mihem Chapa hi chop’a namatsah ham?” ati.
Chuin ipi aso ding chu amu’vin aloihon ajah a, “Pakai, chemjama kasat dingu hitam?” atiuve.
Chuin alah uva khat’in thempu chungnung sohpa asat le jetlam abilkol asat lhatan ahi.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, “Hichan beh hi phal’un,” ati. Chuin abilkol chu atham in aboldam tan ahi.
Chuin aman dinga hung thempu pipuiho le houin ngah vaipoho chule upa ho jah a chun, “Gucha michom man dinga kon banga chemjam le moltum thoa nahung konu ham?
Nangho toh niseh a houin a kaum lai chunla keima matnan nakhut nalha pouvin; amavang tu hi nangho phat le muthim thahat ahi,” ati.
Chuin amahon ama amanun thempu chung nung in lama akaitauve; chuin Peter in galkanga ajuipeh-in ahi.
Chuin amahon inpi leitol lailungah mei akitiuvin atou khomun. Peter jong amaho lah a chun atouvin ahi.
Ama meivah laiya atou pet chun soh nungah khat’in amun aven, “Ama jong hi akiloipi ahi” ati.
Ahivangin aman aseilep’in, “Numei keiman ama chu kahepoi,” ati.
Ajo chomkhat jouvin mi adang khat’in amun a jah a, “Nang jong alah uva khat nahi,” ati. Ahivangin Peter in, “Mipa, keima kahipoi,” ati.
Chuin nidan khat chan jen jouvin michom dang khat’in atah ti tenin, “Ama jong hi aloiho khat mong mong ahi; ijeh-inem itile ama hi Galilee ahi,” ati.
Ahivangin Peter in, “Pasal nasei chu keiman kahe hih hel’e,” ati. Hiche asei phat chun ah akhongtan ahi.
Chuin Pakai chu akiheiyin Peter lam aven ahile, “Tunia ah khon masanga thumvei neiseilep ding ahi,” tia Pakaiyin asei chu ageldoh-in,
po lama apot’in lhase tah-in hakan akaptan ahi.
Chuin Jesu man a tuh ho chun ama chu elnop nan abol’un avouvin,
chuin ponin amit atomun, “Koiham nadenga chu gaovin lang seiyin,” atiuvin,
Chule ataitom ataitomun, ama gotnan thu tamtah aseiyun ahi.
Chuin jing khovah vah-in miho upaho chengse thempu pipuiho le danthu sun ho pumin akikhomun, houvaipoloi kikhopna a chun akaiyun,
“Nangma Christa chu nahile neiseipeh-un,” atiuve. Ahivangin aman amaho jah a, “Keiman nangho seipeh jong leu veng natahsan lou dingu;
chule dong jong leng neidonbut lou dingu ahi.
Ahivangin tua pat Mihem Chapa hi Pathen thilbol thei jet lama tou ding ahitai,” ati.
Chuin amahon abon chauvin adongun, “Achutile nangma Pathen Chapa nahim?” atiuve. Chuin aman ajah va, “Naseiyu chu kahi,” ati.
Chuin amahon, “Thu hettohsah dang iding ititah dingu ham? Eihotah-in ama kama kijata hi,” atiuve.
Chuin mipi kikhom chengse chu akipatdoh-un ama chu Pilate hengah akai tauvin ahi.
Chuin ahehse panun, “Hichepa hin ‘Keima Christa leng kahi’ tia Caesar kai peh ding akhama kavaiyu apuiset kamanui” atiuve.
Chuin Pilate’in adongin, “Nangma Judate lengpa nahim?” ati. Ahin aman adonbut’in, “Naseikhai,” ati.
Chuin Pilate’in thempu pipuiho le mipi jah a, “Hichepa chungah khansetna imacha kamupoi,” ati.
Chuin amahon ahapan cheh-un, “Hichepa hin Galilee gama kipanin hiche kom geiyin Judea gam khotin’ah ahil le ahil len mipi jouse achohnoh jin ahi,” atitauvin ahi.
Chuin Pilate’in Galilee thu ajah phat chun, “Ama hi Gililee mi ham?” tin adonge.
Chuin ama chu Herod thuneina gam mi ahi ahet phat’in Herod hengah agah sol tan ahi; ijeh-inem itile hiche laiya chu ama Jerusalem a uma ahi.
Chuin Jesu amu phat chun Herod akipah lheh jengin ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman athu ajah jeh a sot’a pat ama chu mu atup ahitan; chule melchihna avetsah khat tou muding kinem lheh ahi.
Chuin Herod chun thu tamtah adongin, ahivangin aman imachan adonbutpoi.
Chuin thempu pipuiho le danthu sun ho adingun ama chu aheh heh jengun ahi.
Chuin Herod le aseipaiten nahsahmo le elnopnan abol’un pon loupi asilpeh-un Pilate heng lama asol kit tauve.
Hiche nitah chun Herod le Pilate akihou thei lhontan ahi; ijeh-inem itile chuche masanga chu kidou jing ahilhone.
Chuin Pilate’in thempu pipuiho le vaipoho chule miho chu akou khomin ajah uva.
“Miho apuisei tia hichepa hi kahenga nahin kaiyu ahin, veuvin, keiman amo amo lou phate chan na-ang sunguvah kapatep’in achungah themmona kamupoi, nanghon naheh nau thudol’a chun;
Herod jengin jong amupoi; ijeh-inem itile aman kahenguva ahinsol kittah hi; veuvin athina theilom imacha abol loupi hi.
Hijeh chun keiman bolgim ing ting lhadoh tange,” ati.
[Hiche kut sunga chu amaho chu mikhat alhadohpeh ding mong ahi.]
Ahivahgin amahon tha khat tah-in asam un, “Hichepa hi sumang in, Barabbas neilhadoh peh-un,” atiuve.
Ama chu khopi sung chonoh jeh le atol tha jeh a songkul’a kikhuma ahi.
Chuin Jesu chu alhadoh nom jeh-in Pilate’in ajah uva thu asei kit’in;
ahivangin amahon, “Ama chu thingpel’a khenbeh-in, thingpel’a khenbeh-in,” tin asamtauve.
Chuin aman athumveina-in, “I-bol’in em? Hichepan ipi suhset aneiyam? Keiman thina theilom ama chunga ima kamupoi; hijeh chun bolgim ing ting lhadoh tange,” ati.
Ahivangin amahon o sang tah-in ahasap cheh-un, thingpela akhetbeh teina dingin athumun; chuin a-oginun aneh joujotai.
Chuin athum banguva bol dingin Pilate’in thu alhuhsah tan ahi.
Chuin aman khosung chonoh le toltha jeh a songkul’a kikhum athumpau chu alhan; Jesu vang chu amaho lung got banga dingin apedoh tan ahi.
Chuin akaimang phat’un gama hung kon Cyrene gam mi Simon amanun Jesu nung lama pu dingin achungah thingpel chu angamun ahi.
Chule mihonpi atama tam le a-op chum chuma kap numei mipi nasatah-in anung ajuiyun ahi.
Ahin Jesu akiheiyin ajah uva, “Jerusalem chanute, keima neika hih-un, nangho le nachateu dingjoh-in kap’un.
Ijeh-inem itile veuvin aching ho le chavop khalou naobu chule naonoi chepsah khalou ho anun nomui, ati dingu hitobang nikho chu hung lhung ding ahi.
Chutengle amahon mol jah a, ‘Neilhuh khumun,’ atiuva, lhang jah a, ‘Neikhu khumun neiselun,’ ati dingu ahi.
Ijeh inem itile amahon thing hing bon hitia abol’u le thing go i-aloda dingu ham?” ati.
Hichea chun amatoh thatha ding akhang gilou adang mi ni jong apuiyun ahi.
Chuin lugu atiu mun chu alhun phat’un ama chu thingpel’ah akhenbeh,un chule akhang giloute ni jong chu khat ajet lamah khat avei lamah akhenbeh-un ahi.
Chuin Jesun, “Pah, amaho hi ngaidam in; ijeh-inem itile amahon abol’u hi ahepouve,” ati. Chuin avang akiveuvin aponsil chu akihomtauve.
Chuin miho chu adingun ave jingun ahi; chule vaipohon jong anelpeh-un, “Midang bon huhhinga chu; Pathen lhen Christa chu ahile, ama kihuhhing hen,” atiuve.
Chuin sepaiho jong chu akoma ahungun lengpiga twi thuh apeuvin.
“Judate lengpa nahile kihuhhingin,” tin elnop nan abol’un ahi.
Chuin ama hi, “Judate lengpa ahi,” tia kisun hetsahna achungvum ah aumin ahi.
Chuin akikhaiya khang giloute ni khat chun ajon houvin, “Nangma Christa chu nahi lou ham? Nangma kihuhhingin kei ni jong neihuhhing lhon tang,” ati.
Ahivangin khatpa chun ama chu adonbut’in aphoh-in, “Nangman Pathen jeng jong nagin lou ham? Talen tha khat man a?
Eini hi talen man ding dol mong ihi; thilbol manbou ikisan ahi; hichepa hi itile ima suhset neilou ahi,” ati.
“Chuin Jesu, nagam nalhun teng le neihe jingin,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Tahbeh a peh nahi, tunia gam loupia keimatoh iumkhom ding ahi,” ati.
Hichu nidan gup don ahin, chua pat chun nidan ko geiyin gam jouse chunga thim ahung jingin nisa athimtan;
chule houin a pondal len chu alailunga akeh lhan ahi.
Chuin Jesun o gingtah-in asamin, “Pah nakhut’a kalhagao kapedoh-e,” atin atantai.
Chuin sepai jalamkai chun thilsoh umchan chu amun Pathen avahchoiyin, “Hichepa hi michonpha tahbeh mong ahi,” atitai.
Chuin vetchah chu ve dinga hung khom mipi ho chun thilsoh um chan chengse chu amu’vin a-op beng bengin akinungle tauvin ahi.
Chule akihetpi ho le Galilee gama kona ahin kilhonpi numeiho jong chu galkanga adingun chuti thilsoh ho chu amu jingun ahi.
Chuin veuvin Juda ho kho Arimathea mi amin Joseph atiu mi phatah le chonpha tah vaipo khat aumin;
ama chun amaho kihou somna thilbol chu jop lou ahin, chule Pathen gam ngah jinga um ahin,
ama chu Pilate henga ahungin Jesu long chu athumin;
chuin alalhan tupat pon nemin atomin amasanga koimacha koikhahna lou song kilai lhan sunga chun alupsah tan ahi.
Hiche ni chu kigot ni ahin, chule cholngah ni kipat jong anaitan ahi.
Chuin Galilee a kona ahin lhonpi numeiho chun anung ajuiyun lhan le along chu iti akoiyu agaveuvin,
akinung leuvin lounam le thao namtui akigot tauvin ahi. Chuin danthupeh dungjuiyin cholngah nin akichol ngah-un ahi.
Ahin hapta ni masanin jingpin agotsau thil namtui chu akichoiyun lhan lama chun ahungun ahi.
Chuin lhankot’a kona song chu tahdohsa ana um agamu’ve.
Chuin asunga alut’un ahile Pakai Jesu long chu agamu tapouve.
Chuin ahitin ahi, chuche jeh a alungdon pettah-un veuvin, pon aval’a val lah lah kisil mi ni akom’uvah ahung ding lhonin;
hichun amaho tijat’a akun chah kheh pettah-un chuche mi ni chun ajah uvah, “Athiho lah a ibol’a ahinga nahol’u ham?
Ama hikoma aumtapoi, athoudoh tai. Aman Galilee gama aum laiya najah uva asei,
’Mihem Chapa hi miho khut’a pehdoh a um tei ding chule thingpel’a akhetbeh dingu, chule athumna ni leh thoudoh kit tei ding ahi,’ ati chu geldohun,” ati lhone.
Hichun amahon athu ho chu ageldoh-un,
chuin lhana kon chun akileuvin thu chucheng chu som le khat le adang ho jah a agaseiyun ahi.
Amaho chu Magdalene Mariam le Joanna chule Jacob nu Mariam; chule numei dang ho toh ahiuvin, hicheng thu chu solchah ho jah a agaseiyun ahi.
Ahivangin athuseiyu chu amahon moh thu mai maiyin ana ngaitouvin, anatahsan pouve.
Ahivangin Peter akipatdoh-in lhan lama chun alhai jel’in; chuin ahungin agahvet le tupat ponho seh seh aum chu amun, thilsoh um chan chu kidang asan a-in lama ache mangtan ahi.
Chuin veuvin hiche nitah chun alah uva mini Emmaus khoa ache lhonin; hichu Jerusalem a kona ching som gup ahi.
Amani chu chuche thilsoh um chan jouse thudol akihoulim lhonin;
chuin ahitin ahi, amani akihoulim lhona akidohto pet lhonin, Jesu tah-in ahinnai lhonin amani chutoh alhonin ahi.
Ahivangin ahet lhon louna dinga amit lhon kiphel’a ahi.
Chuin aman ajah lhona, “Nalamjot pum lhona nakihoulim lhon hiti ho chu ipi thu nakihoulim lhon ham?” atile; ading lhonin a-ngui chet lhone.
Chuin khatjoh amin Cleopas atiu chun adonbut’in, “Jerusalem a chenga tu lai thusoh umchan helou nangma changseh bou nahim?” ati.
Chuin aman amani jah a, “Ipi thu thu ham?” ati. Amanin, “Pathen le miho jouse mitmua athua le athilbola themgao thahat neitah,
Nazareth Jesu thudol ahi; thempu pipuiho le kavai po houvin tha dinga thu alhuhsah dingin apedoh-un, thingpel’a athat tauve.
Keihonla ama chu Israelte lhatdoh dinga kakineppiu ahi. Ahin hicheng tailou chun, chuti thilsona chu tuni anithum ni hita.
Chuma le kaloi lah uva numei phabep khat’ in eilungdon sah-ui;
jingpin alhan lama aga cheuvin chua along agahol mouvin ahung kileuvin keihon Vantil kamu’vin, amaho chun, ‘Ama ahing kittai,’ atiuve, ahung tiuve.
Chuin kaloi lah uva phabep khat lhan lama aga cheu le numei ho sei bang bang chun agamu’vin; ama agamu tapouve,” ati lhone.
Chuin aman ajah lhonah, “Vo lungthim bei, themgaoho thusei jouse tahsan ding lung ngongkai ho;
Christa chun hicheng gim genthei chu athoh soh keiya chule aloupina a lut ding mong hilou ham?” atin;
chuin Mosea pat le themgao ho jousea pat’in Pathen lekhabu pumpia ama thudol kisun jouse chu amani ahilchen tan ahi.
Chuin ache na dingu khokom ageiyun ama akal’a chepai ding bang akisai.
Chuin amanin alho lhonin, “Keini toh umnau hite; ni asaojo achetan, nilhah konjong ahitai,” ati lhone. Chuin ama amanitoh um dingin alut tan ahi.
Chuin amanitoh an nedinga atouvin aman changlhah alan phatthei aboh-in, chuin aheh hal bal’in amani chu apei.
Hitah chun amit lhon avah-in, ama chu ahedoh lhontah; chuin ama amitmu lhona konin amangtan ahi.
Chuin amani chun khat’in khat jah a, “Lampi dunga eiki houlimpi lhona Pathen lekhabu thu eihil chen lhona chu ilung soulah lah jeng hih am?” akitito lhone.
Hiche pettah chun akipat lhonin Jerusalem lama akile lhonin, chukoma som le khat le aumpiho mun khat’a anaum khomu agatoh lhonin;
amahon “Pakai athoudoh tahbeh mongtai; chule Simon akimusah-e.” anatiuve.
Chuin lam dunga thu umchan le chang lhah ahebal’a amanin ahetdoh lhon hiti imajouse chu amanin jong asei lhonin ahi.
Thu chucheng asei pettah-un amatah alailunguvah ahung dingin, “Nachung uvah lungmon um hen,” ati.
Ahivangin amahon, “Thi lha kamu ahi,” ti angaitouvin, akichauvin atija lheh jengui.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Ibol’a lung olmoa nahiuvem? Chule ibol’a nalunguva ginchatlel soh ham?
Kakhut kakeng veuvin lang heuvin, keima kahibouve; neitham un veuvin; ijeh-inem itile keima neimu bangu hin lhagao agu aphe a um poi. ati;
hiti chun atin, akhut akeng avetsah tan ahi.
Ahivangin akipa jeh uva chuchea jong tahsan lou laiyuva alungdon pettah-un, aman ajah uva, “Neh ding ima them naneiyum hikoma hi,” ati.
Chuin amahon nga kikang khat apeuvin ahi.
Chuin aman alan a-ang sunguvah anetai.

Chuin aman ajah uva, “Keima nangho toh iumkhom laiyuva najah uva, ‘Mose danthua, themgaoho lekhabua chule Labua keima thudol kisun jouse guilhung soh kei ding ahi,’ ‘tia najah uva kasei chu hiche hi ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Pathen lekhabua chu ahetdoh theina dingun alungu ahonpeh tan ahi.
Chuin ajah uva, “Hitin akisune, ‘Christa chun gim le genthei athoh a anithum ni leh athi lah a kona thoudoh kit ding;
chule Jerusalem a kipan chitin namtin jah jousea ama min a lungheiya chonset suh beina kihil lhang ding ahi.
Hichengse chu aboncha ahetoh nangho nahiuve.
Chule veuvin, ka-Pa thutep chu keiman nangho chunga kahinsol lhah ding ahi; amavang chunga kona thahatna nakivon masang seuvin hiche khopia hin umjingun,” ati.
Chuin aman amaho chu Bethany khokeng geiyin apuidoh-in, akhut aphong in amaho chu phatthei aboh-in ahi.
Chutia phatthei aboh pettah chun amaho chu akikhenpin chuin van a lah touvin aumtai.
Chuin amahon ama chu chibai aboh-un kipah thanom tah-in Jerusalem a ahung kiletauve.
Chule houin a Pathen vahchoiyin aum jing tauve.
